Ross"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ShresthaKNSR25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.727"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ShresthaKNSR25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.727","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"在资源受限（如小参数量或有限算力）的设定下，直接使用复杂的推理数据从头训练模型，往往会导致模型陷入局部最优，只能记住表面模式而无法涌现出真正的泛化推理能力。","importance":"训练动态与数据级贡献。强调了 Curriculum Learning（课程学习）在小模型推理能力建设中的决定性作用，对 Post-train 阶段的数据排序有直接启发。","technical_approach":"提出“训练前预热”（Warm Up Before You Train）策略。在进行全量复杂推理数据训练或 SFT 之前，先引入一个 Warm-up 阶段，使用结构简化、逻辑清晰或高质量的基础数据对模型进行初始化训练。这种做法类似于为模型建立基础的逻辑表征空间，避免其在面对高难度数据时发生梯度混乱或死记硬背。","experiments":"在小参数量模型（如 <3B）上进行实验。相比于直接在目标推理数据集上训练，经过 Warm-up 阶段的模型在数学和常识推理任务上的最终准确率有显著提升，且收敛速度更快。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"In resource-constrained settings (e.g., small parameter counts or limited compute), training models directly from scratch on complex reasoning data often leads to local optima, where models memorize surface patterns instead of developing true generalized reasoning capabilities.","importance":"Training dynamics and data contribution. Emphasizes the decisive role of Curriculum Learning in building reasoning capabilities for small models, offering direct inspiration for data ordering in the post-train phase.","technical_approach":"Proposes a 'Warm Up Before You Train' strategy. Before full-scale training or SFT on complex reasoning data, a warm-up phase is introduced using structurally simplified, logically clear, or high-quality foundational data. This establishes a basic logical representation space for the model, preventing gradient confusion or rote memorization when faced with high-difficulty data.","experiments":"Experiments conducted on small-parameter models (e.g., <3B). Compared to training directly on the target reasoning dataset, models that underwent the warm-up phase showed significantly higher final accuracy and faster convergence on math and commonsense reasoning tasks.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pretraining-strategy","reasoning","resource-constrained"]},{"id":"ShuWZDL25","title":"Beyond Input Activations: Identifying Influential Latents by Gradient Sparse Autoencoders","authors":["Dong Shu","Xuansheng Wu","Haiyan Zhao","Mengnan Du","Ninghao Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ShuWZDL25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.87"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ShuWZDL25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.87","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"传统的稀疏自编码器（SAE）仅基于前向激活值（Activations）进行重建，这会提取出大量方差虽大但对模型最终输出（Loss）毫无因果影响的冗余“死特征”。","importance":"机制分析与可解释性范式级改进。将 SAE 的目标从“表征重建”转向“归因重建”，这是让特征真正具备因果效力（Causal Efficacy）的关键一步，解决了当前 SAE 路线的效率瓶颈。","technical_approach":"提出梯度稀疏自编码器（Gradient SAE）。在训练 SAE 时，不再仅仅拟合前向激活值，而是引入激活与梯度的乘积（或直接拟合梯度信息）。这种设计强制 SAE 优先学习那些不仅在输入中活跃，而且对下游任务 Loss 有实际梯度贡献的 Latent 特征，从而过滤掉纯粹的背景噪声。","experiments":"在开源大模型的中间层提取特征。相比标准激活值 SAE，Gradient SAE 发现的特征在消融实验（Ablation）中表现出显著更高的因果效力，且达到同等解释力所需的活跃特征数（L0 范数）大幅减少。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Traditional Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) reconstruct based solely on forward activations, extracting many redundant 'dead features' that have high variance but zero causal impact on the model's final output (loss).","importance":"Mechanism analysis and interpretability paradigm improvement. Shifts the SAE objective from 'representation reconstruction' to 'attribution reconstruction', a crucial step in giving features true causal efficacy and solving the efficiency bottleneck of current SAE approaches.","technical_approach":"Proposes Gradient Sparse Autoencoders (Gradient SAE). During SAE training, instead of merely fitting forward activations, it incorporates the product of activations and gradients (or fits gradient information directly). This forces the SAE to prioritize latent features that are not only active in the input but also have actual gradient contributions to the downstream task loss, filtering out pure background noise.","experiments":"Extracted features from intermediate layers of open-source LLMs. Compared to standard activation SAEs, features discovered by Gradient SAE show significantly higher causal efficacy in ablation experiments, requiring far fewer active features (L0 norm) to achieve the same explanatory power.","authors_note":""},"tags":["sparse-autoencoder","interpretability","latent-features"]},{"id":"ShuWZRYLD25","title":"A Survey on Sparse Autoencoders: Interpreting the Internal Mechanisms of Large Language Models","authors":["Dong Shu","Xuansheng Wu","Haiyan Zhao","Daking Rai","Ziyu Yao","Ninghao Liu","Mengnan Du"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ShuWZRYLD25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ShuWZRYLD25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.89/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"must_read","summary":{"core_problem":"随着稀疏自编码器（SAE）在 LLM 机制可解释性（Mechanistic Interpretability）领域的爆发式增长，文献中充斥着各种架构变体、训练目标和评估指标，缺乏一个统一的分类学框架。","importance":"综述类。为快速发展的 SAE 领域提供了系统性的梳理，帮助研究者理清字典学习（Dictionary Learning）在 LLM 内部机制解析中的技术脉络和 Trade-off。","technical_approach":"系统性回顾了 SAE 的发展历程。按架构（如标准 L1 SAE、Top-K SAE、Gated SAE）、训练目标（重建误差与稀疏性惩罚的平衡）以及评估指标（如重建保真度、L0 稀疏度、因果干预有效性）对现有工作进行了分类。同时探讨了 SAE 在特征消融、模型引导（Steering）和安全对齐中的实际应用。","experiments":"无直接实验（综述文章）。总结了多篇核心论文的实证发现，指出了当前 SAE 面临的特征发散（Feature Splitting）和计算开销过大等核心挑战。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"With the explosive growth of Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) in LLM Mechanistic Interpretability, the literature is flooded with architectural variants, training objectives, and evaluation metrics, lacking a unified taxonomic framework.","importance":"Survey. Prior work mostly treated extrapolation as a positional design problem, so the likely claim here is that this framing is incomplete.","importance":"This is primarily a mechanism-level contribution rather than a new paradigm. The pretraining takeaway is important if the claim holds: long-context generalization is partly a distribution-shift problem in attention statistics, so better extrapolation may require bias correction during training or inference, not just swapping RoPE for another position scheme.","technical_approach":"The method appears to add context-aware bias terms to attention or a related scoring function, on top of existing extrapolation-friendly architectures. The design choice is conservative: keep the base Transformer and correct the score distortions that emerge at longer lengths, instead of rebuilding the positional stack from scratch. That is plausible because many extrapolation failures look like miscalibrated relative weighting over long ranges rather than a complete inability to access long-range information.","experiments":"The provided metadata contains no abstract, numbers, model sizes, datasets, or baselines, so no quantitative summary can be stated reliably. Embedding Slices Instead of Tokens for Fine-Grained and Balanced Transformer Scaling","authors":["Harshil Vejendla"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/Vejendla25a","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.807"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/Vejendla25a","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.807","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：MoE Transformer 的路由粒度过粗，按 token 路由容易造成专家负载不均，也限制了细粒度容量利用。现有 MoE 大多默认 token 是最自然的路由单位，但一个 token embedding 内部不同子空间可能对应不同功能，把整 token 送给一个专家会浪费可分解结构。","importance":"它属于架构与系统交叉处的方法级贡献。对 pretrain 的意义在于，如果 slice-level routing 真能同时改善负载均衡和质量，那么 MoE 的有效容量扩展路径就不只剩下加专家数、调 auxiliary loss 或改 router 温度，还可以从表示粒度本身重做设计，这对大规模稀疏预训练很有启发。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 SliceMoE：不再把完整 token embedding 作为最小路由单元，而是把 embedding 切成多个 slice，分别路由到不同专家。它是对标准 token-level MoE 的结构改造，不是简单换 loss。这样做的逻辑是，slice 路由让专家接收到更同质、更细分的表示子空间，因此更容易形成专业化，同时每个 token 可分摊到多个专家路径，天然缓和单专家拥塞。与最接近的 token-level top-k routing 相比，它牺牲的是实现复杂度、通信模式和可能更高的 router 开销；换来的潜在收益是更平衡的负载和更高的参数利用率。","experiments":"从给到的信息里无法确认实验规模和具体结果，因此不能报告具体提升数字。按题目判断，关键实验应包括与 Switch/标准 top-k MoE 的对比，关注 perplexity 或下游精度、专家负载均衡指标、router entropy、训练吞吐和通信开销，并通过 embedding slice 数量做消融。真正决定方法价值的会是两个问题：一是质量提升是否在相同 FLOPs 或相同 activated parameters 下仍成立；二是系统开销是否抵消了理论上的稀疏优势。当前信息不足以确认。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a structural limitation of standard MoE Transformers: routing at the token level is coarse, which can create expert imbalance and underuse representational structure inside each embedding. The underlying bet is that different subspaces of a token embedding need not be processed by the same expert.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with direct implications for sparse pretraining. If routing embedding slices instead of whole tokens improves both balance and model quality, it broadens the scaling toolbox beyond adding more experts or tuning load-balancing losses; it suggests that routing granularity itself is a major design lever.","technical_approach":"SliceMoE appears to split each token embedding into multiple slices and route those slices independently to experts. This is a structural modification of token-level MoE rather than a minor router tweak. The rationale is straightforward: finer routing can produce cleaner expert specialization and reduce hotspot experts because each token no longer monopolizes a single routing decision. The trade-off is equally clear: more routing decisions, more complicated communication, and a larger implementation burden.","experiments":"No abstract or results are provided, so model sizes, datasets, baselines, and gains cannot be stated safely. Its relevance to pretraining is that long-context adaptation is not only about the positional scheme itself; it also depends on whether one can cheaply locate a scaling configuration that matches the model's learned frequency profile and the target length regime.","technical_approach":"From the title, the method is a divide-and-conquer search procedure for scaling factors, replacing exhaustive sweeps with hierarchical narrowing. The trade-off is straightforward: if the objective landscape is highly irregular, a hierarchical search can miss narrow optima. Prior methods often amplify positives or high-reward rollouts, but positives are sparse on hard reasoning tasks, so the resulting supervision is both weak and biased.","importance":"If the empirical gains hold, this matters beyond a narrow RL tweak. It suggests that the bottleneck in reasoning post-training is not only better rewards, but also better use of already collected failures; that is directly relevant to the pretrain-posttrain interface because signal density, not just data volume, governs what the model actually internalizes.","technical_approach":"From the title, the method augments policy optimization with negative samples rather than treating them as dead weight. The likely mechanism is to transform, pair, or relabel failed trajectories so they become contrastive or comparative supervision about where reasoning went wrong. Compared with pure rejection sampling or winner-only updates, this design aims to extract structure from failures and improve sample efficiency. The trade-off is clear: if negative augmentation is noisy or semantically misaligned, the policy may learn brittle anti-patterns instead of robust reasoning.","experiments":"The abstract is missing, so the base models, datasets, baselines, and exact gains cannot be confirmed. The expected evidence would compare against standard reasoning optimization pipelines such as PPO, DPO, GRPO, or best-of-N filtering on math or code reasoning benchmarks, plus ablations on how negative samples are selected and transformed.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rl","reasoning","negative-samples"]},{"id":"YangYLQGZ25","title":"XQuant: Achieving Ultra-Low Bit KV Cache Quantization with Cross-Layer Compression","authors":["Haoqi Yang","Yao Yao","Zuchao Li","Baoyuan Qi","Guoming Liu","Hai Zhao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/YangYLQGZ25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.494"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/YangYLQGZ25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.494","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":7,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：KV cache 在长上下文推理中占用显存过大，而极低比特量化通常会明显伤害生成质量。传统 KV 量化大多逐层独立处理，忽略了层间冗余，因此在 2-bit、甚至更低位宽时误差很难压住。","importance":"这是典型的系统级贡献，但对预训练研究也有反馈价值。更便宜的 KV cache 直接决定长上下文 serving 的可行性，而如果跨层压缩确实有效，它也说明 transformer 中缓存状态存在可利用的跨层相关结构，这对架构设计和训练时的冗余控制都有启发。","technical_approach":"从标题看，XQuant 的核心不是只改量化器，而是把 cross-layer compression 引入 KV cache 压缩。它的判断是：不同层的 key/value 表征并非完全独立，因此可以先做跨层共享、映射或低秩压缩，再在更低比特上量化，从而把误差预算从‘每层单独承担’改成‘跨层协同分摊’。这与常见的 per-layer/per-token 量化不同，优点是能把超低比特做得更稳，代价是实现更复杂，并且跨层耦合可能增加解码时的数据访问和重建开销。摘要缺失，无法确认它是训练后量化还是需要少量校准/微调。","experiments":"缺少摘要，无法确认支持到多少 bit、适配哪些模型和上下文长度。按标题判断，关键实验应围绕 1-2 bit KV cache 与现有方法比较，在困惑度、长文 QA、吞吐、显存占用上展示更好的 Pareto；还应有跨层压缩关闭后的 ablation，用来证明收益不只是来自更强校准。没有具体数字时不应夸大。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical bottleneck in long-context inference: KV cache memory is too large, and ultra-low-bit quantization often degrades generation noticeably. Most prior KV compression methods treat layers independently, which leaves a lot of inter-layer redundancy unused and makes 2-bit or lower settings hard to sustain.","importance":"This is mainly a systems contribution, but it also feeds back into pretraining research. If cross-layer compression works well, it implies that transformer cache states contain exploitable structure across layers rather than being fully layer-specific; that is informative for both architecture design and redundancy control during training.","technical_approach":"From the title, XQuant combines ultra-low-bit KV quantization with cross-layer compression instead of only refining the quantizer itself. The key idea is likely that key/value states across layers are correlated enough to support shared projections, low-rank reconstruction, or other joint compression before quantization. That changes the error budget from 'each layer must preserve itself' to 'layers can share representational capacity.' Compared with standard per-layer quantization, this should help at extreme bit widths, at the cost of more complex runtime reconstruction and potentially less modular deployment.","experiments":"The abstract is unavailable, so the exact bit widths, model families, and quantitative gains cannot be verified. Prior work has used reflection and self-correction mostly as empirical tricks, with limited theory for scaling behavior or failure modes.","importance":"Its significance lies in reframing self-correction as a probabilistic inference problem rather than a bag of prompting heuristics. For the pretrain-posttrain interface, that matters because a predictive theory of test-time correction could inform reward design, calibration, and how much inference compute to allocate per query.","technical_approach":"From the title, the paper proposes a probabilistic scaling theory for self-correction. The likely formulation treats the model's first answer as an uncertain estimate and later correction steps as additional evidence or posterior updates, linking final accuracy to initial accuracy, correction reliability, and the number of correction attempts. The appeal of this approach is that it can explain not only gains but also diminishing returns and error amplification. The limitation is equally clear: if the assumptions behind the probabilistic model are too idealized, the theory may fit only certain tasks or prompting regimes.","experiments":"The abstract is missing, so it is unclear how broadly the theory is validated. Pilehvar"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"$a","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.16252","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/AbbasiMP25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1769"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/AbbasiMP25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1769","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：怎样用一个模型无关、计算便宜的方法衡量输入 token 对 LLM 输出的重要性，而不依赖昂贵且模型特定的解释性工具。现有可解释方法常常需要访问内部梯度、特定层结构或反事实重算，迁移性和成本都不理想；作者试图直接利用 embedding 与输出头之间的几何关系给出 token 重要性信号。","importance":"它的贡献更偏机制分析与可解释性工具，而不是改进预训练本身。对 pretrain dynamics。","technical_approach":"核心方法 NormXLogit 是一种基于输入表示和输出表示的 token 重要性估计法，属于对现有线性头几何性质的重新利用，而不是新模型。作者先论证：在预训练中，词 embedding 的范数能有效反映 token 重要性；再进一步提出，token 重要性和它对输出 logit 的影响幅度显著相关，因此可以只看输入/输出表征构造简单指标。这个设计避开了复杂 attribution 的主要成本，也绕开了特定架构假设。它隐含的前提是：输出头保留了足够多的可解释几何结构，而不是被层间非线性彻底打散。","experiments":"从摘要能确认的实验结论是两点：第一，embedding norm 在预训练期能够捕捉 token importance；第二，token importance 与其引起的 logit 表征变化存在显著关系。摘要没有给出模型列表、评测任务、相关系数、AUC 或与哪些解释方法对比，因此无法判断这是强替代还是粗粒度 proxy。最关键的实验应当包括跨架构泛化、与 leave-one-out 或 gradient-based attribution 的一致性，以及在不同训练阶段该关系是否稳定；目前只能确认作者声称该方法更简单且更具模型无关性。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a simple but useful question: can token importance be estimated with a cheap, model-agnostic signal instead of architecture-specific and computationally heavy interpretability methods? Existing approaches often rely on gradients, interventions, or internal assumptions that do not transfer cleanly across LLM families.","importance":"This is mainly an interpretability and training-dynamics contribution, not a direct pretraining improvement. Its relevance to pretraining is that it treats embedding norms and output-head geometry as meaningful signals rather than incidental scale effects. If that holds broadly, it has implications for how we read vocabulary statistics, embedding regularization, and the evolution of token salience during training.","technical_approach":"NormXLogit is a lightweight token-importance estimator built from input and output representations. The paper first argues that embedding norms learned during pretraining track token importance. It then links importance to the magnitude of a token's effect on output logits, yielding a simple representation-based score. The attraction is clear: no expensive perturbation pipeline, no heavy architecture dependence, and no need to commit to a specific attribution mechanism. The trade-off is that the method bets on the final head preserving interpretable geometry.","experiments":"The abstract supports two empirical claims: embedding norms are predictive of token importance during pretraining, and token importance is strongly related to how much a token's representation affects the logits. But the abstract gives no model list, benchmark details, correlations, or comparison numbers against baselines, so the practical strength of the evidence is hard to calibrate here. The decisive tests would be consistency with perturbation-based attribution and robustness across architectures and training stages.","authors_note":""},"tags":["interpretability","logit-lens"]},{"id":"2503.03032","title":"SAFE: A Sparse Autoencoder-Based Framework for Robust Query Enrichment and Hallucination Mitigation in LLMs","authors":["Samir Abdaljalil","Filippo Pallucchini","Andrea Seveso","Hasan Kurban","Fabio Mercorio","Erchin Serpedin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Despite the state-of-the-art performance of Large Language Models (LLMs), these models often suffer from hallucinations, which can undermine their performance in critical applications. In this work, we propose SAFE, a novel method for detecting and mitigating hallucinations by leveraging Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs). While hallucination detection techniques and SAEs have been explored independently, their synergistic application in a comprehensive system, particularly for hallucination-aware query enrichment, has not been fully investigated. To validate the effectiveness of SAFE, we evaluate it on two models with available SAEs across three diverse cross-domain datasets designed to assess hallucination problems. Empirical results demonstrate that SAFE consistently improves query generation accuracy and mitigates hallucinations across all datasets, achieving accuracy improvements of up to 29.45%.","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.03032","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/AbdaljalilPSKMS25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/AbdaljalilPSKMS25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.496/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：LLM 幻觉不仅要检测，还要在检索或问答前就主动改写查询以减少后续幻觉，但现有工作通常把“检测”和“缓解”分开做，且很少利用 SAE 提供的可解释内部特征。过去方案往往在生成后做事实核验或置信过滤，能发现问题，但很难在源头上改变模型会去检索什么、会如何组织问题。","importance":"它的贡献是一个后训练阶段的工具链整合，重要性中等，更偏系统方法而非基础机理突破。对 pretrain/posttrain 接口的启示在于：SAE 学到的稀疏特征不只是解释模型，还可以充当 hallucination-aware control signal，参与 query enrichment 这种上游决策。这个方向值得看，但边界也明显：它依赖现成 SAE 和外部流程编排，离“从预训练目标直接降低幻觉”还很远。","technical_approach":"SAFE 是一个基于 Sparse Autoencoder 的幻觉检测与缓解框架，核心不是训练新的 LLM，而是把 SAE 特征接到查询增强流程里。作者的关键设计是把 SAE 作为中间表征分析器，用来识别与幻觉相关的激活模式，再据此做 hallucination-aware 的 query enrichment，从而让下游生成更聚焦、更少脱离证据。与传统只做 rerank 或事后 fact-check 不同，它把控制点前移到查询阶段；与只做 SAE 解释不同，它把这些特征用于干预。这个设计有效的前提是：SAE 特征在不同数据域上足够稳定，并且与真实幻觉风险而非表面不确定性相关。","experiments":"摘要明确说作者在两个具备 SAE 的模型上、三个跨领域幻觉数据集上评估 SAFE，并报告其能稳定提升 query generation 和 hallucination mitigation 表现。但摘要没有提供模型名、数据集名、评价指标，也没有给出提升幅度，因此无法判断收益是边际优化还是大幅改进。若看正文，最值得关注的应是：只做 SAE 检测 vs 检测+query enrichment 的差距、跨模型迁移是否成立、以及在高召回减少幻觉时是否明显牺牲任务正确率。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a gap that many hallucination pipelines leave open: they detect bad generations after the fact, but do little to steer the upstream query so the model retrieves and frames the problem better in the first place. SAE-based analysis and hallucination mitigation have both been studied, but usually as separate components.","importance":"This is a post-training systems contribution with moderate importance. The interesting takeaway for the pretrain–posttrain interface is that SAE features may be useful not only for interpretation but also as actionable control signals in a retrieval or query-construction pipeline. The limitation is equally clear: this does not reduce hallucination at the modeling objective level and depends on having workable SAEs for the target model.","technical_approach":"SAFE is an SAE-based framework that combines hallucination detection with hallucination-aware query enrichment. The key idea is to use sparse features as an intermediate diagnostic layer, identify activation patterns associated with hallucination risk, and then revise or enrich the query before generation. This moves intervention earlier than standard fact-checking pipelines and gives SAEs an operational role rather than a purely explanatory one. The design only works if the SAE features are stable enough across domains and actually track hallucination risk instead of generic uncertainty.","experiments":"According to the abstract, SAFE is evaluated on two models with available SAEs and three cross-domain hallucination datasets, and it consistently improves both query generation and hallucination mitigation. Manning","Shikhar Murty"],"institutions":["Stanford University"],"abstract":"Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit a robust mastery of syntax when processing and generating text. While this suggests internalized understanding of hierarchical syntax and dependency relations, the precise mechanism by which they represent syntactic structure is an open area within interpretability research. Probing provides one way to identify the mechanism of syntax being linearly encoded in activations, however, no comprehensive study has yet established whether a model's probing accuracy reliably predicts its downstream syntactic performance. Adopting a\"mechanisms vs. outcomes\"framework, we evaluate 32 open-weight transformer models and find that syntactic features extracted via probing fail to predict outcomes of targeted syntax evaluations across English linguistic phenomena. Our results highlight a substantial disconnect between latent syntactic representations found via probing and observable syntactic behaviors in downstream tasks.","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.16678","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/AgarwalJMM25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1712"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/AgarwalJMM25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1712","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：线性 probing 测到的“句法信息可读出”到底能不能解释模型在真实句法测试中的表现。过去很多工作默认把 probe accuracy 当作模型内部掌握句法机制的证据，但这一步经常把“能从表示里读出来”混同为“模型实际依赖它完成任务”。作者要检验的正是这种机制—结果之间是否真的对应。","importance":"这篇工作的价值很高，属于机制分析里的纠偏型结果。对 pretrain 研究的启示是：我们不能把 probe 当成训练目标或表征质量的充分代理，尤其在讨论语言结构学习时，‘表示中可线性读取’和‘模型用该机制得到行为结果’可能是两回事。这会直接影响大家如何评估预训练是否学会 syntax、如何设计 auxiliary losses、以及如何解释 scaling 后的语言能力来源。","technical_approach":"核心方法不是提出新的 probe，而是搭建一个“mechanisms vs. outcomes”评估框架，对 32 个开源 Transformer 同时做句法 probing 和 targeted syntactic evaluations，再看二者相关性。这个设计的关键在于把内部表征诊断和外部行为测评并排处理，而不是只报一个 probe 分数。作者关注的是：如果线性 probe 真抓到了驱动行为的机制，那么不同模型间 probe 准确率应该能预测它们在英语句法现象上的表现；如果预测不了，就说明 probe 更像旁观者信号而非因果机制证据。","experiments":"摘要给出的核心事实很清楚：作者覆盖 32 个开源 Transformer，结论是 probing 提取到的句法特征无法预测 targeted syntax evaluations 的结果，而且这一点跨多类英语语言现象成立。这是负结果，但信息量很高。摘要没有给出具体相关系数、模型规模范围或哪类 probe 最失败，因此无法进一步比较是完全无关还是只有弱相关。最值得看正文的地方应是：不同层、不同句法属性、不同控制设置下是否都失效，以及是否存在少数任务 probe 仍有预测力。","authors_note":"作者包括 Christopher D. Manning。若机构信息属实，这类工作通常延续 Stanford NLP 在结构性泛化、语言机制解释和 probing 方法学上的代表性路线。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether syntactic probing actually explains syntactic behavior. Much prior work treats high probe accuracy as evidence that a model has learned the relevant syntactic mechanism, but that conflates decodability from representations with the mechanism the model uses when producing behavior.","importance":"This is an important corrective result for interpretability and pretraining analysis. The main message is that probe scores should not be treated as a reliable proxy for learned syntax or for downstream syntactic competence. That matters directly for pretraining research because probing is often used to justify claims about what structure a model has internalized during training.","technical_approach":"The contribution is an evaluation framework rather than a new probe. The paper compares, across 32 open-weight transformers, syntactic information recoverable via probing against performance on targeted syntactic evaluations. The logic is simple and strong: if probes capture behaviorally relevant syntax, models with better syntactic probes should also do better on targeted syntax tests. If not, probing is at best a weak observational signal and not a mechanism-level explanation.","experiments":"The headline result is clear from the abstract: across 32 open-weight transformer models, probing-derived syntactic features fail to predict outcomes on targeted syntactic evaluations over English phenomena. Existing rotation-based methods help, but handling the heavy tails well enough to quantize weights, activations, and KV cache together at 4 bits remains difficult.","importance":"This is a solid systems-method contribution with direct deployment value. The indirect pretraining lesson is that heavy-tailed activation geometry is not just a serving nuisance; it reflects something persistent in model representations. If many deployment fixes are compensating for it, that may eventually feed back into how we regularize or shape activations during training.","technical_approach":"KurTail is a post-training quantization method that uses kurtosis-based rotation to mitigate outliers. The key choice is to optimize kurtosis, a direct measure of tail heaviness, rather than relying on a more generic rotation objective. The method is optimized layer by layer, which keeps memory usage manageable for large models. Compared with QuaRot-style approaches, the paper ties the rotation objective more explicitly to tail statistics. Compared with SpinQuant, the abstract claims both better accuracy and lower latency. The trade-off is the usual PTQ one: easy to adopt, but bounded by how much a fixed pretrained representation can be improved by rotation alone.","experiments":"The abstract gives concrete improvements. KurTail enables 4-bit quantization of weights, activations, and KV cache. Against QuaRot, it improves MMLU by 13.3% and reduces Wiki perplexity by 15.5%. Against SpinQuant, it gains 2.6% on MMLU and also lowers latency. What is not specified are the model families, parameter scales, and absolute latency numbers, so the breadth of the gain across architectures is still unclear from the abstract alone.","authors_note":"The author list includes Aleksandar Bojchevski and Evangelos Eleftheriou. We introduce Soteria, a lightweight yet powerful strategy that locates and minimally adjusts the\"functional heads\"most responsible for harmful content generation in each language. By altering only a fraction of parameters, Soteria drastically reduces policy violations without sacrificing overall model performance, even in low-resource settings. The proposed trie-based decoding aims to exploit that shared structure to cut redundant work.","importance":"This is a serving/inference systems contribution with indirect relevance to pretraining. It matters wherever beam search remains necessary, especially constrained generation and structured decoding, where search costs can dominate and repeated-prefix bookkeeping is substantial.","technical_approach":"The key idea is to represent beam hypotheses in a trie so common prefixes are handled once rather than repeatedly. That can reduce duplicated state tracking, constraint checking, and possibly some cache management around shared prefixes. Zhu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ChangSWZHLLGXZ25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.931"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ChangSWZHLLGXZ25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.931","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：test-time scaling 想靠多采样、多步验证或树搜索换性能，但纯生成会浪费算力，纯 verifier 又容易在错误候选上做无效筛选。作者提出 step-level verifier-guided hybrid scaling，目标是在每一步推理时更早地淘汰差路径，把额外计算用在更有希望的推理分支上。","importance":"这是推理方法级工作，和 pretrain 的关系在于它会反过来影响我们如何看待‘模型能力来自参数还是来自推理算力’。如果 step-level verifier 真能稳定提高 compute-quality 曲线，它对后训练和 serving 都有现实价值，也会推动 pretrain 阶段更重视可验证中间步骤而非只优化 final answer likelihood。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 hybrid test-time scaling：生成器负责扩展候选推理轨迹，step-level verifier 在中间步骤而不是只在最终答案处打分和剪枝。这样设计的理由很直接：很多错误在早期步骤就能暴露，如果等到完整轨迹生成完再筛，计算已经花掉了。与只做 best-of-N、self-consistency 或 final-answer verifier 的方法相比，它的区别在于更细粒度的过程监督式搜索，把 verification 从终点评估前移到路径控制。","experiments":"从标题看，实验应当覆盖数学、代码或需要多步推理的任务，并比较相同 test-time compute 下的准确率。当前没有摘要，无法确认底座模型、verifier 规模、采样预算、主要 baseline 和具体提升幅度。最关键的证据应包括：在固定或更低推理预算下优于纯采样和终点 verifier；以及一个 ablation 说明 step-level guidance 比只在 final answer 打分更高效，而不是单纯因为用了更强 verifier。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a The proposed step-level verifier-guided hybrid approach tries to intervene earlier, allocating extra inference compute to more promising reasoning paths.","importance":"This is an inference-method contribution, but it matters for how we think about capability allocation between pretrained parameters and test-time compute. This work exploits context-dependent sparse activation to skip unnecessary computations and accelerate inference.","importance":"Efficiency-level contribution. FFN layers dominate Transformer compute; effective sparse activation in down projection can reduce inference FLOPs with minimal accuracy loss. Provides insights into FFN activation sparsity patterns relevant to pretrain research.","technical_approach":"COUNTDOWN dynamically identifies unnecessary weights/neurons in the down projection based on context, skipping their computation at inference time. Unlike static pruning, this is dynamic sparsification that retains full parameters but activates only needed ones. With minimal fine-tuning, the expanded model outperforms the original, enabling cheap scaling.","authors_note":"Nachum Dershowitz (Tel Aviv University)"},"tags":["layer-duplication","architecture"],"notable_authors":["Nachum Dershowitz"]},{"id":"EyceozNWHS25","title":"Hopscotch: Discovering and Skipping Redundancies in Language Models","authors":["Mustafa Eyceoz","Nikhil Shivakumar Nayak","Hao Wang","Ligong Han","Akash Srivastava"],"institutions":["MIT","IBM"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/EyceozNWHS25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/EyceozNWHS25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.861/","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 推理时所有 token 都必须经过所有 Transformer 层，但大量简单 token 的表征在浅层就已饱和，导致严重的计算冗余。","importance":"效率与架构优化。跳出静态剪枝，探索动态计算分配（Dynamic Compute Allocation），对加速长上下文推理和降低 Serving 成本极具价值。","technical_approach":"引入动态层跳过（Layer Skipping）机制。在推理时计算中间层的置信度或冗余度，对于已饱和的 token 直接跳过后续层（Hopscotch），而非像传统 Early Exiting 那样必须在特定分类头退出。","experiments":"在保持困惑度（Perplexity）和下游任务准确率基本不变的前提下，显著降低了前向传播的 FLOPs。观察到不同词性的 token 对深度的需求存在明显差异。","authors_note":"Akash Srivastava (MIT / IBM)"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"During LLM inference, all tokens must pass through all Transformer layers, even though representations for many simple tokens saturate early, leading to severe computational redundancy.","importance":"Efficiency and architecture optimization. Many activation-editing methods work, but the control is often entangled and hard to bound.","importance":"This is a method contribution in representation-space control. Its broader relevance to pretraining is that success in sparse feature space would support the view that pretrained models contain more local, decomposable factors than raw dense activations reveal, which matters for interpretability and controllable post-training interfaces.","technical_approach":"The method, SAE-SSV, appears to perform supervised steering in a sparse representation space. Most model editing methods were built for dense models and do not transfer cleanly to sparse expert architectures.","importance":"This is a useful method contribution at the intersection of MoE and model editing. It matters for pretraining because MoE is increasingly relevant at scale, and if sparse models are hard to update, correct, or patch after training, their operational value drops. Efficient editing makes MoE maintenance more realistic.","technical_approach":"The title indicates the main idea: edit MoE models through compressed experts. A plausible design is to compress expert parameters or represent edits in a lower-dimensional expert subspace, then intervene only where routing suggests it matters rather than updating the entire model. The appeal is lower compute and memory cost plus better locality, with the trade-off that compression may limit edit expressivity.","experiments":"Without the abstract, task type, compression ratios, and reported numbers are unknown. It reveals the issue of overconfidence in deeper layers.","technical_approach":"Probes the hidden states of intermediate layers, maps them to vocabulary distributions, calculates the Expected Calibration Error (ECE) at each layer, and observes the trajectory of calibration across depth.","experiments":"Finds that model calibration does not improve monotonically with depth. For certain tasks, intermediate layers often exhibit the best calibration, while the final layers suffer from overconfidence, causing the ECE to rise.","authors_note":"IIT Kanpur"},"tags":["calibration","layer-analysis","training-dynamics","interpretability"],"notable_authors":["Ashutosh Modi"]},{"id":"KabirTA25","title":"From n-gram to Attention: How Model Architectures Learn and Propagate Bias in Language Modeling","authors":["Mohsinul Kabir","Tasfia Tahsin","Sophia Ananiadou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/KabirTA25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/KabirTA25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.1003/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要回答的是：不同语言模型架构究竟如何学习并传播语料偏差，而不仅仅是“是否有偏差”。以往偏差研究常把模型当黑盒测输出差异，较少追问 n-gram、RNN、Transformer/attention 在偏差吸收和传播路径上的机制差异；作者显然在做这种架构层面的拆解。","importance":"它的重要性在于把“偏差评测”推进到“偏差形成机制分析”。这对 pretrain 有现实价值，因为偏差不只是数据问题，也会被架构的归纳偏置放大或缓释。若结论可靠，它能影响数据清洗之外的另一条路线：架构选择、层间传播控制、甚至训练目标设计。不过从标题看，这更像分析型工作，而非直接给出新的去偏训练方法。","technical_approach":"方法上应是跨架构对比分析：从 n-gram 到 attention，比较模型在相同或可控数据条件下如何编码和传递偏差信号。这个设计有意义，因为简单比较最终 bias score 并不能区分“数据导致”与“架构放大”；只有把语料、容量和训练条件尽量控制住，才能看清哪种架构更容易记忆局部共现、哪种更容易跨长距离传播偏差。标题里的 propagate 暗示作者不只测静态偏差，还可能分析层、位置或上下文上的扩散机制。没有摘要，无法确认具体偏差类型是性别、种族、职业刻板印象，还是语义关联偏移。","experiments":"实验细节无法确认，但合理预期包括：多个架构家族在同数据、同参数量或同困惑度水平上的比较；偏差指标与语言建模性能的联合报告；以及控制 n-gram overlap、context length 或 attention head 的分析。如果论文扎实，最有价值的发现会是某类架构虽然总体 perplexity 更低，但会更强地跨上下文传播已有偏差，或者相反，旧架构偏差更多是局部记忆而不是全局传播。当前信息不足以写出具体数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a sharper question than standard bias evaluations: how do different language model architectures learn and propagate bias, not just whether they exhibit it? Prior work often treats models as black boxes and reports output disparities, while leaving the formation and transmission mechanism underexplained; this study appears to compare that mechanism from n-grams to attention-based models.","importance":"Its contribution is diagnostic rather than directly algorithmic, but that still matters for pretraining. Bias is not only a data issue; model inductive bias can amplify, localize, or spread it in different ways. If the paper makes that case convincingly, it informs mitigation choices beyond dataset filtering, including architecture selection and training design. From the title, this looks more like a mechanism study than a new debiasing method.","technical_approach":"The likely approach is a controlled cross-architecture comparison under matched data and training conditions. That is the right setup because output bias scores alone cannot separate what comes from the corpus from what the architecture amplifies. By comparing n-gram models and attention-based models, the paper can probe whether some architectures mainly memorize local co-occurrences while others propagate biased associations over longer contexts. The use of “propagate” suggests the analysis goes beyond static bias measurement and looks at where and how the signal spreads.","experiments":"The provided metadata does not support concrete experimental claims. A strong evaluation would compare multiple architecture families on the same corpora, report both LM quality and bias metrics, and include controls over context length, n-gram overlap, or attention components. The most interesting result would be a dissociation such as better perplexity but stronger long-range bias propagation, or conversely high local bias with weaker contextual spread, but this cannot be stated as fact without the abstract.","authors_note":""},"tags":["bias","language-modeling","architecture","training-dynamics"],"notable_authors":["Sophia Ananiadou"]},{"id":"KadlcikSMKS25","title":"Pre-trained Language Models Learn Remarkably Accurate Representations of Numbers","authors":["Marek Kadlcík","Michal Stefánik","Timothee Mickus","Josef Kuchar","Michal Spiegel"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/KadlcikSMKS25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1356"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/KadlcikSMKS25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1356","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答的是：预训练语言模型到底有没有学到准确的数值表示，而不只是记住常见数字模式。过去对 LLM 数字能力的判断通常来自算术 benchmark，结论多半偏悲观，因为模型在计算任务上错误很多；作者把问题收窄到“表示是否准确”，并给出一个相反方向的判断：预训练模型可能比外界以为的更会表示数字。","importance":"这项工作的重要性在于纠正一个常见混淆：表示能力与运算能力不是一回事。对 pretrain 研究，这个区分很有价值，因为它会影响我们如何理解 tokenizer、embedding geometry、数值外推和数据混合策略。如果模型已经学到高保真数值表征，那么后续瓶颈更可能在推理程序、位置组合或解码，而不是数字本体表征。这是机制分析层面的贡献，不一定直接提升指标，但能修正研究方向。","technical_approach":"从标题看，方法应该是对预训练模型内部数值表示做系统探测，而不是单做下游算术评测。所谓 remarkably accurate representations，很可能意味着：用 probing、表示空间几何分析、相似度随数值距离变化、跨格式一致性或可线性读出的数值属性来验证模型是否编码了 magnitude/order。这样的设计比直接测加减乘除更合适，因为算术失败可能来自多步组合错误，而不代表底层数字 embedding 不准。与既有工作差别在于，它把研究对象从“任务表现”转向“内部表示质量”。","experiments":"没有摘要，无法确认覆盖了哪些模型、语言、数字范围和指标。若论文扎实，关键实验应包括：不同参数规模和 tokenizer 方案下的数值表示精度；整数、小数、负数、科学计数法等格式的泛化；表示误差与下游算术误差的相关性；以及频次控制实验，排除只是记忆常见数字模式。最重要的结果如果存在，应该是即使在低频或未见数值区间，表示仍保持与真实大小关系高度一致；但当前不能编造成具体数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether pretrained language models actually learn accurate internal representations of numbers, rather than merely memorizing frequent numeric strings. Prior discussions often infer numeric competence from arithmetic benchmark scores and conclude that LMs are weak with numbers; this work appears to separate representation quality from computational ability and argues that the former is much better than commonly assumed.","importance":"Its main contribution is conceptual and mechanistic: it disentangles number representation from arithmetic execution. That matters for pretraining because it changes where we look for the bottleneck—tokenization, embedding geometry, and numeric generalization on one side, versus procedural reasoning and composition on the other. If the claim holds, poor arithmetic performance should not be read as evidence that pretraining failed to encode magnitude or order.","technical_approach":"From the title, the paper likely probes internal representations rather than relying only on downstream arithmetic tasks. “Remarkably accurate representations” suggests analyses such as linear probing of magnitude, geometry aligned with numerical distance, format-invariant encoding, or consistency across integer/decimal forms. This is the right framing because arithmetic failures can arise from multi-step composition errors even when the underlying numeric representation is sound. The key distinction from prior work is shifting the target from task success to representational fidelity.","experiments":"The abstract is missing, so model families, scales, datasets, and quantitative findings cannot be stated. A convincing study would compare multiple pretrained models and tokenizers, test a wide range of number formats and frequencies, and analyze whether representational accuracy persists beyond frequent seen values. The strongest evidence would be robust alignment between latent representation and true numerical magnitude even for rare or extrapolated numbers, but that cannot be claimed without the paper details.","authors_note":""},"tags":["representation","numbers","pretrained-models","generalization"]},{"id":"KanekoAB25","title":"Balanced Multi-Factor In-Context Learning for Multilingual Large Language Models","authors":["Masahiro Kaneko","Alham Fikri Aji","Timothy Baldwin"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/KanekoAB25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1016"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/KanekoAB25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1016","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：多语大模型做 in-context learning 时，示例选择往往在多个因素上失衡，导致性能不稳定。现有 ICL 通常只按语义相似度、语言一致性或标签覆盖单独选例，结果是某一因素优化了，另一因素被破坏；作者提出 balanced multi-factor ICL 来同时平衡这些条件。","importance":"这是典型的方法级工作，对 multilingual inference 和轻量适配有直接价值。虽然它不改预训练本体，但会反过来帮助理解多语模型在 few-shot 条件下依赖哪些信号。对 pretrain 研究者来说，若多因素平衡显著优于单因素检索，说明模型的跨语种泛化不是只靠语义近邻，提示预训练阶段的数据平衡和上下文校准可能更重要。","technical_approach":"核心方法应是一个多因素示例选择/重排序框架，在语言、任务、标签、语义相似度等维度间做平衡，而不是单目标贪心。这样设计有效，是因为多语 ICL 里常见冲突很实际：选同语言样本有利于表面格式对齐，但可能牺牲任务难度匹配；选最相似语义样本又可能导致标签偏斜。Balanced 的意义不是平均分配，而是在有限 prompt budget 下避免某个因素主导上下文。和最接近的已有方法相比，差别应在于显式建模因素间 trade-off，而非单一检索指标。","experiments":"没有摘要就无法确认实验规模和提升数字。合理预期的实验包括：多个语言、多个任务上的 few-shot 评测；与 random、similarity-based、same-language-only、label-balanced 等 ICL baseline 对比；以及 prompt 长度和示例数变化下的稳健性分析。如果论文有说服力，最有价值的发现会是 balanced 方案不只提高平均性能，还显著降低跨语言方差，尤其对低资源语言更稳，但当前无法写成确定结果。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses instability in multilingual in-context learning caused by imbalanced example selection. Existing ICL strategies often optimize one factor at a time—semantic similarity, language match, or label coverage—and that can improve one axis while hurting another; this work proposes a balanced multi-factor selection strategy.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with practical value for multilingual inference and lightweight adaptation. It does not change pretraining directly, but it can reveal what multilingual models actually rely on in few-shot settings. If balancing multiple factors clearly outperforms one-factor retrieval, that suggests multilingual generalization is not driven by semantic proximity alone and has implications for data balancing during pretraining.","technical_approach":"The likely method is a prompt-construction or example-ranking framework that explicitly balances several factors such as language, task similarity, label diversity, and semantic closeness. This makes sense because multilingual ICL has real trade-offs: same-language demonstrations help format alignment, highly similar examples can skew labels, and diversity can hurt local relevance. The key idea is not to optimize a single retrieval score, but to prevent one factor from dominating under a limited prompt budget.","experiments":"The missing abstract prevents any reliable reporting of model scales, tasks, or gains. A convincing evaluation would span multiple languages and tasks, compare against random sampling, similarity-only retrieval, same-language-only prompts, and label-balanced baselines, and analyze robustness across prompt lengths and shot counts. Liang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/LiAL25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-INDUSTRY.89"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/LiAL25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-industry.89","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是持续语言学习里的遗忘与低效复用问题。现有 learning”框架，用多个学习体在持续学习过程中互相蒸馏或约束，而不是只让单模型按时间线单向更新。这样的设计通常有效，是因为它把历史知识保留从参数级惩罚改成了预测分布级对齐，能更直接约束表示漂移；代价是训练更重、协同策略更敏感，且若新数据本身有偏，互学也可能放大偏差。由于未提供摘要，无法确认它是双模型在线互教、教师缓存，还是阶段性交替蒸馏。","experiments":"给到的信息不足，无法可靠总结模型规模、数据规模、基线和具体提升数字。按题目判断，实验大概率会比较顺序微调、经验回放、EWC It suggests that continual adaptation may benefit from mutual teaching between learners rather than only replaying old data or freezing parts of the model, which is potentially useful for continual pretraining and pretrain-to-posttrain transitions.","technical_approach":"The method appears to use mutual learning across learners during lifelong training, likely through distillation-style agreement rather than purely time-ordered updates of a single model. Awareness Optimization: Towards Semantic Disambiguation for Direct Preference Optimization","authors":["Jian Li","Shenglin Yin","Yujia Zhang","Alan Zhao","Xi Chen","Xiaohui Zhou","Pengfei Xu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/LiYZZCZX25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.460"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/LiYZZCZX25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.460","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"DPO 默认所有偏好数据都是确定且二元的（chosen 绝对优于 rejected），忽略了人类偏好数据中固有的语义模糊性和噪声，导致模型容易过拟合噪声信号并降低生成多样性。","importance":"对齐/Post-train 阶段的数据质量优化。指出了偏好数据的绝对二元假设是 DPO 训练不稳定的重要来源，为基于 margin 的损失函数改进提供了新视角。","technical_approach":"引入模糊度感知优化（AAO）。通过评估 chosen 和 rejected 回复之间的语义相似度或不确定性，动态调整 DPO loss 中的 margin 或权重。对于模糊度高的样本对降低惩罚力度，避免模型在无意义的微小差异上过度自信。","experiments":"在标准对齐基准（如 MT-Bench, AlpacaEval）上评估。相比原生 DPO 和 IPO，AAO 能在保持指令遵从能力的同时，显著降低过拟合风险并提升胜率，具体指标因缺乏摘要原文暂略。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Standard DPO assumes all preference pairs are deterministic and strictly binary, ignoring the inherent semantic ambiguity and noise in human preferences, which leads to overfitting and reduced generation diversity.","importance":"Post-training data quality refinement. It identifies the absolute binary assumption of preference data as a key source of DPO instability, offering a new perspective for margin-based loss improvements.","technical_approach":"Introduces Ambiguity Awareness Optimization (AAO). It dynamically adjusts the margin or weight in the DPO loss based on the semantic similarity or uncertainty between chosen and rejected responses. High-ambiguity pairs receive lower penalties, preventing the model from becoming overconfident on noisy, marginal differences.","experiments":"Evaluated on standard alignment benchmarks (e.g., MT-Bench, AlpacaEval). It challenges the overwhelmingly dominant pure-decoder paradigm, demonstrating the superiority of an asymmetric 'encoder-compression + decoder-generation' architecture for extreme long-context scenarios.","technical_approach":"Introduces E2LLM (Encoder Elongated LLMs). It employs an efficient Encoder to preprocess ultra-long input texts, compressing/mapping them into a shorter sequence of dense representations (elongated representations). These compressed tokens are then prepended to a standard Decoder LLM for reasoning. This decoupled design shifts the burden of long-context understanding to the more efficient Encoder.","experiments":"Tested on long-context benchmarks like LongBench. Compared to methods that directly extend the Decoder's context window, E2LLM achieves a multi-fold context compression ratio, drastically reducing inference memory footprint while maintaining high accuracy on long-document QA and retrieval tasks."},"tags":["long-context","encoder","architecture"]},{"id":"LinsX25","title":"Reinforcement Learning with Supervised Alignment","authors":["João Luís Lins","Jia Xu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/LinsX25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/LinsX25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.378/","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"纯粹的 RLHF 训练容易导致模型偏离预训练或 SFT 阶段的数据分布（即对齐税 Alignment Tax），表现为在通用能力（如 MMLU）上的性能下降。","importance":"Post-train 损失函数设计。提出了一种融合监督信号与强化学习信号的联合优化范式，有效缓解了对齐过程中的灾难性遗忘。","technical_approach":"提出带有监督对齐的强化学习（Reinforcement Learning with Supervised Alignment）。在 PPO 或 DPO 的目标函数中，显式地加入监督学习（SFT）的正则化项或联合损失。使得模型在最大化人类偏好奖励的同时，其策略分布被锚定在高质量的示范数据上，防止过度优化（Reward Hacking）。","experiments":"在标准对齐流程中测试。相比单纯的 RLHF，该方法在提升人类偏好胜率的同时，显著降低了在基础知识问答和推理基准上的性能衰减（Alignment Tax）。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Pure RLHF training often causes the model to deviate from the data distribution of the pretraining or SFT phases (known as Alignment Tax), manifesting as degraded performance on general capabilities (e.g., MMLU).","importance":"Post-training loss function design. Existing fixes often rely on decoding constraints or post-hoc filtering, while this work appears to frame the issue as a distribution mismatch between training dynamics and the desired text-conditioned speech distribution.","importance":"This matters because it treats TTS hallucination as a generative modeling problem, not just a speech engineering artifact. For speech LMs and unified token-based modeling, the implication is that maximum-likelihood training on discrete acoustic tokens may amplify undesirable modes when alignment between text condition and acoustic realization is weak.","technical_approach":"The core idea is distribution alignment with GFlowNets. Prior discussions often attribute failures on compositional or hierarchical tasks to architecture or objective design, but skewed data distributions and shallow statistical cues may already explain much of the instability.","importance":"This is a mechanism and diagnosis paper rather than a new modeling recipe. Its relevance to pretraining is practical: if hierarchical generalization is highly data-driven, then changing architecture or adding reasoning-style supervision may miss the main lever. Dataset construction, coverage, and curriculum may matter more than many current interventions assume.","technical_approach":"The likely approach is controlled data manipulation rather than proposing a new model. The core experiment is to vary the training data distribution in systematic ways and measure how stable hierarchical generalization remains under those changes. A strong design would separate in-distribution success from true hierarchical OOD generalization and quantify sensitivity across random seeds and data mixtures.","experiments":"The important evidence would come from controlled synthetic or semi-synthetic tasks, with variance across seeds and data settings reported explicitly instead of only mean accuracy. The most informative result would be that changing only the data composition can flip the same model from successful to failed hierarchical generalization, or that the instability persists across scales. 的启示是，对齐效果不仅取决于正样本有多好，也取决于负样本是否覆盖了模型真实会犯的错误；如果 strategic error amplification 有效，那么 preference learning 可以更像 hard negative mining，而不只是被动吃标注对。","technical_approach":"题目表明核心方法是 SeaPO：Strategic Error Amplification for Robust Preference Optimization。直观上，作者会主动放大或构造模型容易犯、但现有偏好对中不够突出的错误模式，再把这些更难的负例用于偏好优化。关键不只是加更多 rejected，而是策略性地让 rejected 更接近 decision boundary，从而迫使模型学会更稳的偏好判别。和普通数据增强的区别是它围绕错误类型设计；和标准 chosen-vs-rejected training is often not robust when preferences are noisy, negatives are too easy, or the model encounters shifted error patterns. In those cases, methods like DPO can learn a brittle boundary that looks good in-domain but fails on harder or slightly different failures.","importance":"This is a method contribution focused on alignment robustness. The broader lesson for the pretrain/posttrain interface is that alignment quality depends not only on good positive examples, but also on whether the negative side reflects the model’s realistic failure modes. If strategic error amplification works, preference learning starts to look more like hard-negative mining than passive pairwise fitting.","technical_approach":"The core idea in SeaPO appears to be strategic error amplification: actively magnifying or constructing error patterns that the model is prone to make, then using those harder negatives in preference optimization. The point is not simply adding more rejected samples, but making them more decision-boundary-relevant so the model learns a more robust preference function. Compared with standard DPO, the contrastive pairs are likely rewritten, resampled, or adversarially strengthened. Compared with generic augmentation, the focus is specifically on model errors.","experiments":"The important comparisons should be against DPO, IPO, KTO, or related preference-optimization baselines under noisy labels, adversarial prompts, distribution shift, and safety-sensitive settings. An essential ablation is the strength of error amplification: too weak may not help, too strong may create unnatural negatives. Deepens safety alignment from superficial 'behavioral cloning' to 'representation engineering', fundamentally enhancing the model's intrinsic robustness against adversarial attacks.","technical_approach":"Introduces Contrastive Representation Learning. During safety fine-tuning, in addition to the standard generation loss, a contrastive loss is applied to the hidden states. This mechanism forces a geometric separation between safe and harmful instructions in the latent space, ensuring that even carefully disguised jailbreak prompts cannot activate harmful generation pathways, thus front-loading the defense.","experiments":"Against mainstream jailbreak attacks like GCG and PAIR, models aligned with this method show a significantly reduced Attack Success Rate (ASR) team"},"tags":["safety-alignment","representation-learning","contrastive-learning"],"notable_authors":["Bernhard Schölkopf","Mrinmaya Sachan","Zhijing Jin"]},{"id":"SoifferKS25","title":"Semantic Arena-style direct comparisons are useful because they match human preference judgments, but the number of pairwise matches grows quickly with the number of models and the variance depends heavily on the opponent set. Arena-lite appears to use tournament-based comparisons to keep rankings reliable with far fewer matches.","importance":"This is an evaluation-systems contribution, but it matters operationally for both pretraining and post-training teams. Uncovers the low-level neuronal mechanisms during Context vs. Weights conflicts, providing a white-box theoretical foundation for improving RAG robustness and mitigating hallucinations.","technical_approach":"Identifies specific 'entropy neurons'. When a conflict between context and parametric knowledge is detected, these neurons act as a gating mechanism. They modulate attention and MLP outputs to suppress the extraction of parametric memory and enhance context copying.","experiments":"Conducted causal interventions on specific attention heads and neurons, demonstrating that activating or deactivating these entropy neurons can directly flip the model's output preference in conflict scenarios (from relying on weights to relying on context)."},"tags":["interpretability","knowledge-conflict","entropy-neurons","context-copying"],"notable_authors":["Patrick Gallinari"]},{"id":"TroitskiiPWM25","title":"Internal states before wait modulate reasoning patterns","authors":["Dmitrii Troitskii","Koyena Pal","Chris Wendler","Callum McDougall"],"institutions":["Apollo Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/TroitskiiPWM25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/TroitskiiPWM25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.1012/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"引入“等待/暂停 Token”（Wait/Pause Tokens）以增加推理计算量时，模型内部的推理轨迹是如何被改变的。","importance":"新型语言建模范式（Latent Reasoning）。为 Test-time Compute Scaling 和 System 2 推理提供了机制层面的解释，揭示了额外计算量是如何转化为更高质量的推理模式的。","technical_approach":"通过机制可解释性手段，分析紧接在 Wait Token 之前的隐藏状态（Internal states before wait）。发现这些状态充当了“路由节点”，它们不直接生成最终答案，而是将后续的生成过程引导至更具结构化或更深层次的推理子空间。","experiments":"通过因果追踪和激活干预，证明了如果扰动 Wait Token 前的特定隐藏状态，模型通过暂停获得的推理增益将被破坏，证实了这些状态的因果调控作用。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"How the internal reasoning trajectory of a model is altered when 'wait/pause tokens' are introduced to increase inference-time compute.","importance":"New language modeling paradigm (Latent Reasoning). Provides a mechanistic explanation for Test-time Compute Scaling and System 2 reasoning, revealing how extra compute translates into higher-quality reasoning patterns.","technical_approach":"Uses mechanistic interpretability to analyze the hidden states immediately preceding a wait token. Discovers that these pre-wait states act as 'routing nodes'; they do not directly generate the final answer but guide the subsequent generation process into a more structured or deeper reasoning subspace.","experiments":"Through causal tracing and activation intervention, demonstrates that perturbing specific hidden states before the wait token destroys the reasoning gains obtained from pausing, confirming their causal regulatory role."},"tags":["reasoning","internal-states","wait-tokens","interpretability"],"notable_authors":["Callum McDougall"]},{"id":"TutekCMB25","title":"Measuring Chain of Thought Faithfulness by Unlearning Reasoning Steps","authors":["Martin Tutek","Fateme Hashemi Chaleshtori","Ana Marasovic","Yonatan Belinkov"],"institutions":["Technion"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/TutekCMB25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.504"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/TutekCMB25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.504","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 生成的思维链（CoT）究竟是驱动最终答案的真实因果推理过程（Faithfulness），还是仅仅是事后合理化（Post-hoc rationalization）。","importance":"机制分析与推理范式。如果 CoT 是不忠实的，那么大量基于 CoT 的蒸馏和 SFT 可能只是在拟合输出格式，而非真正提升了模型的 Latent Reasoning 能力。","technical_approach":"提出一种基于“遗忘”（Unlearning）的忠实度度量方法。通过在推理时选择性地抹除/遗忘 CoT 中的特定推理步骤，观察最终答案是否发生改变。如果关键步骤被抹除后模型依然得出相同答案，则说明该 CoT 是不忠实的。","experiments":"在数学和逻辑推理任务上测试了标准 LLM。结果表明，模型经常绕过生成的 CoT 步骤直接得出结论，揭示了当前模型中普遍存在的高程度 CoT 不忠实性。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Whether the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) generated by LLMs represents the actual causal reasoning process driving the final answer (faithfulness) or is merely post-hoc rationalization.","importance":"Mechanistic analysis and reasoning paradigms. If CoT is unfaithful, massive CoT-based distillation and SFT might just be fitting output formats rather than genuinely improving the model's latent reasoning capabilities.","technical_approach":"Proposes an unlearning-based metric for faithfulness. By selectively unlearning/ablating specific reasoning steps in the CoT during inference, it observes whether the final answer changes. If the model arrives at the same answer despite critical steps being erased, the CoT is deemed unfaithful.","experiments":"Tested standard LLMs on math and logic reasoning tasks. Results indicate that models frequently bypass the generated CoT steps to reach a conclusion, revealing a high degree of CoT unfaithfulness in current models."},"tags":["chain-of-thought","faithfulness","unlearning","reasoning"],"notable_authors":["Yonatan Belinkov","Ana Marasovic"]},{"id":"VermaAM25","title":"CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding","authors":["Shweta Verma","Abhinav Anand","Mira Mezini"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/VermaAM25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1735"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/VermaAM25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1735","category_id":"llm_pretrain","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：状态空间模型（SSM）在长序列上很高效，但它们是否适合代码理解还缺少系统验证。代码和自然语言不同，依赖结构更离散、更层级化，很多人默认 attention 更适合处理这种非局部关系，因此 SSM 在代码上的位置一直不清楚。","importance":"这是一篇架构迁移与边界评估类工作。对 pretrain 的意义在于，代码是检验新序列建模器的重要试金石；如果 SSM 在代码理解上能逼近或超过 Transformer，那么长上下文、高吞吐代码预训练会多出一条可行路线。反过来，如果它失败，失败点也能说明 SSM 当前对离散符号推理和结构引用的短板在哪里。","technical_approach":"核心方法应是构建一个面向代码理解的 SSM 基线或改进版，并与 Transformer 类模型对齐比较。它大概率不是纯理论 paper，而是把近年的 SSM 架构迁移到代码任务，看看在 token mixing、局部/全局依赖建模和效率上如何权衡。方法有效与否取决于两点：一是 SSM 的线性递推是否足以保留跨函数、跨作用域依赖；二是代码 tokenizer 和训练目标是否让模型更多做模式建模而不是精确引用。相比 Transformer，SSM 通常赢在长序列效率，输在显式内容寻址能力。","experiments":"没有摘要和结果，无法确认用的是哪类代码数据、参数规模和具体任务。按标题看，关键实验应覆盖代码分类、缺陷检测、clone detection 或代码摘要等理解任务，并与 Transformer、可能还包括结构化代码模型做比较。真正有价值的观察会是：性能差距是否随上下文长度变化、是否存在某些任务 SSM 尤其弱，比如需要精确跨位置对齐的任务；但当前无法给数值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks whether state space models are actually viable for code understanding, not just for generic long-sequence modeling. Many existing RM evaluations assume clean and style-consistent inputs, which can hide shallow heuristics behind seemingly strong preference accuracy.","importance":"This is primarily a benchmark and diagnosis contribution, but it matters directly for alignment. Reward models define the training signal for RLHF-style optimization; if they are brittle to paraphrase, formatting, or superficial edits, the policy can learn to exploit those artifacts instead of improving actual response quality.","technical_approach":"The likely core contribution is reWordBench, a benchmark built around controlled input transformations. The key design choice is to separate invariance from sensitivity: some transformations should preserve preference and test robustness, while others should legitimately change preference and test whether the RM remains discriminative. If the paper also proposes an improvement method, the natural mechanisms would be transformation-consistency training or contrastive preference objectives over transformed pairs.","experiments":"The abstract is missing, so the number of transformations, benchmark size, reward models evaluated, and actual gains cannot be verified. The most important results would compare score consistency, ranking flips, or robustness metrics across RM families, then show whether training with the benchmark or its augmentations improves both transformed-input robustness and downstream alignment quality.","authors_note":""},"tags":["reward-model","robustness","benchmark"]},{"id":"WuZJMLYZYX25","title":"ROSE: A Reward-Oriented Data Selection Framework for LLM Task-Specific Instruction Tuning","authors":["Yang Wu","Huayi Zhang","Yizheng Jiao","Lin Ma","Xiaozhong Liu","Jinhong Yu","Dongyu Zhang","Dezhi Yu","Wei Xu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/WuZJMLYZYX25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/WuZJMLYZYX25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.710/","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：任务特定 instruction tuning 时，训练数据很多但质量不均，如何选出最有利于最终任务奖励的数据。传统做法常用 embedding 相似度、困惑度过滤或人工规则，这些指标和最终 reward 并不总一致，因此容易选到看起来干净但对任务收益有限的数据。","importance":"这是典型的数据选择方法级工作。它对 post-train 的直接启示是：如果目标已经很明确，例如某类任务指标或 reward，那么数据选择应当围绕最终奖励做，而不是只围绕通用质量代理；这会影响指令数据构建、主动学习和低预算对齐的策略。","technical_approach":"题目表明方法是 ROSE，一个 reward-oriented data selection framework。核心思想应是用任务 reward 或其近似估计作为选择标准，对候选 instruction 数据进行排序、加权或子集搜索，而不是先验地相信多样性或表面质量代理。这样设计有效的前提是 reward 与真实任务目标对齐，并且估计噪声可控；它相比通用数据打分更贴近目标，但边界在于 reward 一旦窄化或有偏，选出来的数据也会过拟合该奖励。","experiments":"目前没有摘要，无法确认使用哪些任务、数据池规模、选择比例和提升数字。关键实验应包括：与 random selection、quality filtering、diversity-based sampling 和 active selection baseline 相比，在任务特定指令微调后的性能提升；以及在不同数据预算下的收益曲线。若论文扎实，应该还有消融比较 reward proxy 的质量、探索—利用平衡，以及所选数据是否损害跨任务泛化。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a practical question in task-specific instruction tuning: given a large and uneven candidate pool, how do we select examples that actually maximize downstream task reward? Standard heuristics such as similarity, perplexity, or hand-crafted quality rules are only proxies and often misalign with the final objective.","importance":"This is a method-level data-selection contribution with direct relevance to post-training. The useful message is simple: when the end objective is known, data selection should optimize toward that objective instead of relying solely on generic notions of quality or coverage.","technical_approach":"ROSE appears to be a reward-oriented data selection framework that ranks, filters, or weights instruction data using downstream reward or a learned reward proxy. The gain over generic filtering is target alignment: examples are selected because they are expected to improve the actual task signal. The trade-off is also clear: if the reward proxy is narrow or biased, the selected data may overfit that proxy and hurt broader generalization.","experiments":"No abstract is available, so tasks, pool size, selection budget, and exact improvements cannot be confirmed. The central experiments should compare against random selection, quality filtering, diversity-based methods, and perhaps active-learning baselines across multiple budgets. Existing approaches often distill short answers or summarize rationales, but they provide limited control over the accuracy–cost trade-off.","importance":"This is a method-level efficiency contribution for reasoning systems. Its broader value is in treating CoT as a controllable compute resource rather than an all-or-nothing artifact, which matters for deployment, long-context reasoning, and test-time budget allocation.","technical_approach":"TokenSkip is likely a controllable CoT compression method that selectively skips less important reasoning tokens while preserving key steps. That differs from simply asking the model to be brief: the point is to keep enough structure for reasoning while exposing compression rate as a user- or system-controlled variable. A plausible implementation would identify salient tokens or train under explicit compression targets so the model learns to preserve informative steps first.","experiments":"The abstract is missing, so benchmarks, compression ratios, and exact accuracy drops cannot be confirmed. This directly guides the construction of high-quality SFT data mixtures and hallucination reduction.","technical_approach":"Proposes the 'Mutual Alignment' paradigm. Existing compression methods mostly focus on token eviction (sequence pruning), ignoring the channel-wise (feature dimension) redundancy in the Key cache.","importance":"System efficiency optimization. Introduces a compression dimension orthogonal to token pruning, providing a new system-level solution for extreme KV cache compression.","technical_approach":"Proposes LeanK, a learnable K cache channel pruning method. It identifies and drops less informative channel dimensions in the Key vectors via a lightweight learnable mask, reducing memory footprint without truncating the context length.","experiments":"Evaluated on LLaMA models. Significantly reduces K cache memory footprint (e.g., 30-50%) with negligible impact on perplexity (PPL) and downstream task accuracy.","authors_note":"MSRA / Yuqing Yang, Huiqiang Jiang"},"tags":["kv-cache","pruning","efficient-decoding"],"notable_authors":["Yuqing Yang","Huiqiang Jiang"]},{"id":"ZhangLHFL25","title":"AdaptThink: Reasoning Models Can Learn When to Think","authors":["Jiajie Zhang","Nianyi Lin","Lei Hou","Ling Feng","Juanzi Li"],"institutions":["Tsinghua University"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ZhangLHFL25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.184"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ZhangLHFL25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.184","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"当前的推理模型（如 o1 或强制 CoT 的模型）对所有查询都应用长思维链，导致在简单任务上浪费大量算力并增加推理延迟。","importance":"新型语言建模范式（Latent Reasoning）。触及了 System 2 思考的核心痛点：动态算力分配。证明了模型可以内化“何时需要思考”的元认知，对优化 Serving 经济性至关重要。","technical_approach":"提出 AdaptThink，训练模型动态决定推理链的长度或是否需要触发 CoT。通过特定的 SFT 数据或 RL 机制，模型学会在面对简单问题时直接输出答案或提前退出思考，而在面对复杂问题时展开深度推理。","experiments":"在混合难度的 QA 数据集上，AdaptThink 在保持困难任务准确率的同时，大幅降低了简单任务的推理 FLOPs 和延迟，实现了计算资源的自适应路由。","authors_note":"Tsinghua University / Lei Hou, Juanzi Li"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Current reasoning models (like o1 or forced-CoT models) apply long reasoning chains uniformly to all queries, wasting massive compute and increasing latency on simple tasks.","importance":"New language modeling paradigm (Latent Reasoning). Addresses the core pain point of System 2 thinking: dynamic compute allocation. Proves models can internalize the meta-cognition of 'when to think', crucial for serving economics.","technical_approach":"Proposes AdaptThink, training models to dynamically decide the length of the reasoning chain or whether to trigger CoT at all. Standard approaches usually rely on a single LM or training-time ensembles, which limits adaptation once the model is fixed.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution centered on a hard probabilistic metric: compression efficiency. For pretraining research, the broader message is that inference-time composition can change effective language modeling quality without scaling training, which matters for calibration, expert specialization, and test-time adaptation.","technical_approach":"The method uses a weighted product of experts to combine token distributions from multiple experts at inference time. This is not the usual probability averaging: PoE sharpens tokens jointly favored by the experts and suppresses tokens where they disagree, which is attractive for lossless compression because coding cost is directly tied to the assigned probability mass. The main design trade-offs are how to choose weights, how to avoid overconfidence, and how much extra compute the combination adds.","experiments":"Without the abstract, the number of experts, datasets, baselines, and numeric gains cannot be verified. Standard RL sampling often ignores sample difficulty and model uncertainty, which wastes updates on examples that are either too easy or too hard.","importance":"This is a post-training method contribution with a meaningful pretrain interface because it is about signal allocation rather than just reward definition. If perplexity-aware sampling works, it suggests that a language model's own uncertainty estimate can be used as a curriculum signal for reasoning-oriented RL.","technical_approach":"The method is an adaptive perplexity-aware sampling strategy that changes RL training weights based on perplexity. This is not just reward-based resampling: perplexity is used as a proxy for difficulty or information value, and the schedule adapts as the model changes during training. decoding）通常假设 draft model 和 target model 都在 GPU 上运行，但当 GPU 显存不足以同时容纳两个模型时效率大打折扣。Dovetail 要解决的是如何利用 CPU/GPU 异构计算来高效实现推测解码，让 CPU 跑 draft model、GPU 跑 target model，并通过流水线隐藏延迟。","importance":"系统级贡献。对显存受限场景下的 LLM 推理加速有实际价值。对 pretrain 研究的直接影响不大，但推测解码的效率改进间接影响大模型的可用性和迭代速度。","technical_approach":"Dovetail 将 draft model 放在 CPU 上执行，target model 放在 GPU 上，通过精心设计的 It translates human listwise rankings into a permutation probability model, directly optimizing the permutation likelihood of the entire candidate list within the loss function. Compared to decomposing rankings into multiple pairwise losses, this approach more efficiently leverages the transitivity and global structure of ranking data.","experiments":"","authors_note":"Mingzhang Yin"},"tags":["preference-alignment","listwise","dpo"],"notable_authors":["Mingzhang Yin"]},{"id":"ZhengLYC25","title":"When Long Helps Short: How Context Length in Supervised Fine-tuning Affects Behavior of Large Language Models","authors":["Yingming Zheng","Hanqi Li","Kai Yu","Lu Chen"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ZhengLYC25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.522"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ZhengLYC25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.522","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":6,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要回答一个被低估但很实际的问题：SFT 时使用更长上下文，是否会改变模型在短上下文任务上的行为，而不仅仅提升长上下文能力。过去很多人默认‘长数据只影响长任务’，或者把上下文长度当作吞吐与成本问题处理，而没有系统分析它如何重塑模型的响应风格、注意分配和短程决策。","importance":"这项工作的重要性在于，它直接触及 post-train 数据配方对模型行为的迁移效应。对 pretrain 研究者也有价值，因为它提示一个常被忽视的事实：训练时的序列长度分布本身就是强 inductive bias，会改变模型学到的压缩策略、位置使用方式和回答习惯；这不是简单的‘多看一点上下文’。","technical_approach":"从标题看，方法不是提出新模型，而是系统比较不同 SFT 上下文长度对短任务行为的影响。关键设计应当是控制模型、数据来源和总 token 预算，只改 SFT 样本的截断/拼接长度，然后观察短任务上的正确率、冗长度、拒答率、依赖上下文程度或 instruction-following 风格变化。它和一般长上下文论文的区别在于：关注点不是扩窗后能否处理长输入，而是长窗训练如何反向塑造短窗能力，这个角度更接近训练动态研究。","experiments":"目前没有摘要，无法确认使用了哪些模型、是否包含 7B/13B 级别、SFT token 数量和任务集合，也无法给出‘long helps short’的具体幅度。按题目判断，实验应至少比较多种 SFT context length，在短 benchmark 上测表现，并提供行为分析与可能的长度分布消融；最有价值的证据会是：在相同 token 预算下，较长 SFT 序列是否系统性改善短任务，还是只在某些任务上有效并伴随 verbosity 或定位偏差的代价。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper studies a practical but underexamined question: does using longer context during SFT change how a model behaves on short-context tasks, rather than only improving long-context handling? Many practitioners implicitly assume that long-context training only matters for long inputs, or they treat context length mostly as a throughput issue. This paper appears to question that assumption.","importance":"This matters because it isolates sequence-length distribution as a behavioral lever in post-training. The implication for pretraining research is broader: training context length is not just a systems parameter but an inductive bias that can reshape compression strategy, positional usage, and response style. That is directly relevant to curriculum design, annealing, and continual adaptation.","technical_approach":"The work seems to be a controlled empirical study rather than a new architecture. The likely setup is to hold the base model, supervision source, and perhaps token budget fixed, vary only the SFT context length, and then measure downstream changes on short-context tasks. The reason this is interesting is that it tests backward transfer: not whether longer windows help long inputs, but whether long-window supervision changes the model’s short-range decision process and response behavior.","experiments":"No abstract or numbers are available, so model sizes, datasets, benchmarks, and gains cannot be reported factually. alignment，属于微调阶段的数据组织策略创新，而不是新模型。具体做法是在每个训练 batch
