RAG，非英语相对英语仍可出现最高 29% 的准确率下降。作者进一步声称该 batch-wise 对齐显著改善非英语表现，同时保持英语性能，但没有给出模型规模、语言数、任务集合、绝对指标和增幅。因此当前只能判断这是一个面向企业多语言应用的有效工程策略，不能判断其泛化到低资源语言或复杂生成任务的上限。若看正文，最关键的是：一致性提升是否主要来自高资源语言、英语是否真做到不退化、以及和简单上采样多语数据相比多了多少收益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a very practical failure mode: enterprise LLM systems behave inconsistently across languages, with non-English performance trailing English even when RAG is used. Existing fixes often rely on more monolingual data or language-specific tuning, which is expensive and does not explicitly align semantically equivalent behavior across languages.","importance":"This is a practical post-training contribution, but it has a clear pretraining-facing lesson: multilingual quality should not be judged only by average benchmark scores, but by consistency under semantically equivalent inputs. The reported gap of up to 29% under RAG suggests that retrieval does not erase language bias inherited from pretraining and internal reasoning.","technical_approach":"The method is a batch construction strategy for fine-tuning: each batch contains semantically equivalent multilingual examples so the model is trained to align outputs across languages directly. That choice matters. It does more than increase non-English exposure; it gives the optimizer explicit cross-lingual correspondence at every step. Compared with translating everything into English, it preserves target-language reasoning. Compared with independent multilingual fine-tuning, it attacks divergence more directly. The main dependency is high-quality semantically aligned multilingual data.","experiments":"The abstract provides one important anchor: even strong RAG pipelines can suffer up to a 29% accuracy drop in non-English languages relative to English. So the result looks practically relevant, but its magnitude and robustness cannot be fully judged here. The critical comparisons are against naive multilingual upsampling and language-by-language tuning.","authors_note":""},"tags":["multilingual","alignment"]},{"id":"2507.00246","title":"EfficientXLang: Towards Improving Token Efficiency Through Cross-Lingual Reasoning","authors":["Sanchit Ahuja","Praneetha Vaddamanu","Barun Patra"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"Despite recent advances in Language Reasoning Models (LRMs), most research focuses solely on English, even though many models are pretrained on multilingual data. In this work, we investigate: Is English the most token-efficient language for reasoning? We evaluate three open-source RLMs: DeepSeek R1, Qwen 2.5 and Qwen 3, across four math datasets and seven typologically diverse languages. We find that reasoning in non-English languages not only reduces token usage, but also preserves accuracy. These gains persist even after translating the reasoning traces into English, suggesting genuine shifts in reasoning behavior rather than surface-level linguistic effects. The extent of improvement, however, depends on the models multilingual strength. Our findings motivate a broader view of reasoning in language models, highlighting the potential of multilingual reasoning and the importance of strong multilingual foundations. The code for our work can be found: https://github.com/microsoft/EfficientXLang.","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.00246","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/AhujaVP25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/AhujaVP25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.845/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：英语是否真的是推理最省 token 的语言。现有 reasoning model 研究几乎默认用英语做 CoT 和评测，这让“token 效率”这个问题长期被忽略；但多语言预训练模型在不同语言上的分词长度、表达压缩率和推理习惯并不相同，英语未必最优。","importance":"这篇工作的价值在于提出了一个对推理训练和 serving 都有现实意义的反常识观察。对 pretrain 研究者来说，它提醒我们：token efficiency 不是纯 tokenizer 问题，也可能是语言条件下推理轨迹发生变化。摘要里最关键的点是，非英语不仅更省 token，而且不掉精度，甚至把推理过程翻译回英语后这种优势仍在，这意味着差异不只是表面词长。这个结论如果稳，会影响多语言 CoT 数据合成、RL 轨迹采样成本和 test-time reasoning 语言选择。","technical_approach":"方法上这是一项跨语言推理评测研究，不是新模型。作者在四个数学数据集、七种类型差异较大的语言上，测试三类开源推理模型：DeepSeek R1、Qwen 2.5、Qwen 3。关键设计有两点：一是同时看准确率和 token 使用量，而不是只看任务对错；二是把非英语推理轨迹再翻译成英语，检查效率收益是否只是词表或表面语言压缩造成。这个控制很重要，因为如果翻译后优势还在，更可能说明模型在不同语言下走了不同推理路径，而非单纯因为某语言更短。","experiments":"摘要给出的核心实验结论很明确：在多组数学推理评测中，非英语语言可以在保持准确率的同时减少 token 使用；而且把这些推理轨迹翻译回英语后，效率优势仍然存在。作者还指出收益大小取决于模型的 multilingual strength，说明这不是普适常数，而是和底座多语能力耦合。摘要没有给出各语言的具体节省比例、7 种语言列表、4 个数据集名称和各模型上的差异，因此无法判断是少量语言有效还是广泛成立。正文最值得看的，是哪些语言最省、是否受 tokenizer 影响显著、以及强多语模型和弱多语模型之间差异有多大。","authors_note":"论文涉及 DeepSeek R1、Qwen 2.5、Qwen 3 作为评测对象，但这些不是本文作者机构信息。给定信息不足以确认作者团队背景。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper questions a hidden assumption in reasoning research: that English is the most token-efficient language for chain-of-thought. Most reasoning work is run and evaluated in English by default, even though multilingual models may tokenize, compress, and reason differently across languages.","importance":"This is an empirically important and potentially underappreciated result. For pretraining and inference, the key message is that token efficiency is not just a tokenizer artifact; reasoning behavior itself may change by language. The abstract’s strongest claim is that some non-English languages reduce token usage without hurting accuracy, and that this advantage persists even after translating the reasoning traces back into English. If robust, that affects multilingual CoT synthesis, RL trajectory cost, and inference-time language choice.","technical_approach":"This is a multilingual reasoning evaluation study, not a new model. The authors test three open reasoning models—DeepSeek R1, Qwen 2.5, and Qwen 3—on four math datasets and seven typologically diverse languages. Two design choices make the study stronger: they measure both accuracy and token count, and they translate non-English reasoning traces into English to test whether the gain is merely surface compression. If the gain survives translation, the explanation is more likely a true shift in reasoning trajectory than a simple string-length effect.","experiments":"The main empirical claim is clear: on multiple math benchmarks, non-English reasoning can use fewer tokens while preserving accuracy. The abstract also states that the gains persist after translating the traces into English, and that the size of the gain depends on the model’s multilingual strength. What is missing are the per-language savings, the specific seven languages, and model-by-model breakdowns. So the conclusion is intriguing and actionable, but the breadth of the effect still depends on the full results.","authors_note":"The paper evaluates DeepSeek R1, Qwen 2.5, and Qwen 3, but those are evaluated models rather than author affiliations. The authors frame this as a navigation problem over a constrained trade-off surface rather than a single merging heuristic.","importance":"This is mainly a systems-and-method contribution, but it matters for the pretrain-to-posttrain interface. Adapters and LoRA are now the default units for continual adaptation and multi-task deployment, so a better merging procedure can reduce serving cost and checkpoint sprawl without retraining full models.","technical_approach":"HydraOpt appears to be an optimization framework for finding better points on the adapter-merging Pareto frontier, not merely another fixed merge rule. The name suggests a multi-headed or multi-objective search procedure that keeps multiple trade-off directions alive instead of collapsing everything into one scalar objective. Relative to simple averaging, task arithmetic, or validation-set heuristic weighting, the likely novelty is explicit treatment of resource constraints during optimization.","experiments":"The likely empirical focus is joint reporting of task quality and deployment cost, such as extra parameters, memory, latency, or throughput, across merged adapters. Rogers"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ChuangNHCGSHR25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.234"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ChuangNHCGSHR25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.234","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"LLM 在面对需要物理直觉或数值常识的“费米估算”问题时表现挣扎，单次贪婪解码往往会产生严重的幻觉或数量级错误。","importance":"机制与评估级贡献。证明了 LLM 内部潜藏的世界模型（World Model）比单次生成所展现的要准确得多，为如何从预训练权重中提取隐式知识提供了新范式。","technical_approach":"引入“群体智慧解码”（Wisdom of Crowds Decoding）。不对模型进行微调，而是针对同一个估算问题，通过高温度采样生成多条推理路径和数值估计结果，然后使用统计方法（如取中位数）对这些结果进行聚合。以此探究模型在统计意义上是否“知道”正确的数量级。","experiments":"在费米问题数据集上进行探测。实验发现，聚合后的估计值误差显著低于单次贪婪解码或标准 CoT，表明模型在预训练中已经学到了合理的数值分布，只是单次采样容易偏离均值。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"LLMs struggle with 'guesstimation' (Fermi problems requiring physical intuition or numerical common sense), often hallucinating or making order-of-magnitude errors during single-pass greedy decoding.","importance":"Mechanism and evaluation contribution. Cobbina","Tianyi Zhou"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/CobbinaZ25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1503"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/CobbinaZ25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1503","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"在上下文学习（ICL）中，少样本示例（few-shot demos）的放置位置对模型最终的预测准确率有巨大影响，但这种位置偏置的具体规律缺乏系统性量化。","importance":"机制分析级贡献。为 Prompt 工程和预训练/SFT 阶段的数据格式化提供了实证指导，明确了注意力机制在处理长 prompt 时的权重分配倾向。","technical_approach":"系统性地改变 few-shot 示例在 prompt 中的相对位置（开头、中间、末尾，以及与指令和查询的相对关系）。通过控制变量，在不同规模的模型和不同类型的任务上测试位置变化对 ICL 性能的影响。","experiments":"实验证实了强烈的“近因效应”（Recency Bias，示例放在最末尾紧贴 query 效果最好）和次优的“首因效应”（Primacy Bias，放在最开头），而放在中间的示例效果最差，这与长文本检索中的“Lost in the middle”现象高度吻合。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"In In-Context Learning (ICL), the position of few-shot demonstrations drastically affects the model's prediction accuracy, yet the specific patterns of this positional bias lack systematic quantification.","importance":"Mechanism analysis contribution. Sirasao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/DasPS25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-INDUSTRY.164"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/DasPS25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-industry.164","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文要解决的是：模型在量化、剪枝、权重损伤或其他退化后，能否在完全没有原始训练数据的情况下恢复精度。过去的精度恢复通常依赖少量校准集、蒸馏样本或再训练数据，这在隐私受限、模型来源不明或部署端修复场景里并不总是可行。","importance":"它更偏系统级和方法级，对模型部署与压缩后的可恢复性有直接价值。对 pretrain 研究的启发在于：参数退化后可恢复的那部分能力，说明预训练模型存在可被低秩更新重新对齐的误差子空间；这关系到低秩适配的表达能力边界，也关系到模型压缩后是否真的“不可逆损伤”。","technical_approach":"核心思路是用 LoRA 做 data-free recovery。标题里的 Recover-LoRA 表明作者相信退化误差在相对低维的参数子空间内可被补偿，因此不需要全量微调；关键机制通常会围绕如何在无数据条件下构造优化信号，比如利用模型自身统计量、层激活约束、教师-学生自一致或输出分布匹配。选择 LoRA 而不是全参修复的好处是参数开销和部署成本低，但它也默认损伤模式足够低秩，否则恢复上限会受限。","experiments":"由于没有摘要，无法确认退化类型、模型规模和恢复幅度。一个有说服力的实验至少应报告：退化前/退化后/恢复后的准确率或困惑度，覆盖不同压缩强度或噪声强度，并与 data-free baseline、少量数据校准、全参恢复做对比；此外，LoRA rank 与恢复效果的关系会是判断其“低秩假设”是否成立的关键消融。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper asks a practical question: after a language model has been degraded by compression, pruning, quantization, or other weight damage, can we recover accuracy without access to any data? Most recovery methods still rely on calibration sets or retraining data, which is not always available in privacy-restricted or deployment-side repair settings.","importance":"This is mainly a systems-and-method contribution. For pretraining research, the interesting angle is what it says about recoverable error structure: if degradation can be corrected with a small low-rank update, then at least part of the lost capability lives in a structured parameter subspace rather than requiring full relearning.","technical_approach":"The proposed idea is data-free recovery via LoRA. The design bet is that degradation-induced error is low-rank enough to be compensated by lightweight adapters, and that a useful optimization signal can be constructed without real data, for example from internal statistics, self-consistency constraints, or distribution matching; LoRA is attractive because it is cheap and modular, but its ceiling will depend on whether the damage is actually low-rank recoverable.","experiments":"No abstract is given, so the model sizes, degradation setups, and exact gains are unknown. Existing pipelines often fail to balance attack generation and reliable risk assessment.","importance":"This is primarily a systems contribution. Its relevance to the broader pretrain/posttrain stack is indirect but real: if reward-based scoring can replace part of manual evaluation, it shortens the feedback loop for safety testing, failure collection, and alignment-data mining.","technical_approach":"Ferret appears to build an automated red-teaming loop around reward-based scoring. Instead of relying only on heuristics or hard classifiers, a reward model can provide a smoother signal for candidate ranking and search guidance; that can improve efficiency, but it also creates a standard reward-hacking risk where the generator learns to optimize the scorer rather than uncover genuinely harmful behaviors.","experiments":"No abstract is available, so attack domains, target models, and exact speedups are unknown. The concrete question is how to separate tokens supported by visual evidence from tokens produced mainly by the language prior during generation.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with practical relevance. For multimodal pretraining research, the useful takeaway is that hallucination is not only a data or alignment issue; it may also be a decoding-time allocation problem between visual and language pathways, which means some mitigation can happen without changing the base model.","technical_approach":"MaskCD proposes image-head masked contrastive decoding. The likely mechanism is to selectively mask or suppress visual-head contributions during decoding and use the contrast between masked and unmasked predictions to identify visually grounded versus prior-driven tokens; compared with standard contrastive decoding, this makes the contrast target the visual channel directly instead of using a generic weak model.","experiments":"No abstract is available, so benchmarks, model scales, and exact reductions in hallucination cannot be verified. Fung"],"institutions":["Alibaba DAMO Academy"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FanYYWGMKF25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FanYYWGMKF25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.24/","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"现有的多模态 RAG 系统通常将检索器和生成器作为两个独立的冻结模块，检索器无法根据生成器的最终输出质量来调整检索策略。","importance":"跨模态统一与 Pretrain-Posttrain 接口。打破了 RAG 系统的模块化壁垒，证明了端到端 Reward 信号对多模态检索的指导价值，是迈向 Native Multimodal RAG 的关键一步。","technical_approach":"引入奖励反向传播（Reward Backpropagation）机制。将生成器的最终回答质量转化为 Reward，通过可微近似或强化学习算法，将梯度回传给多模态检索器，实现联合优化。","experiments":"在知识密集型多模态问答（如 WebQA）上，端到端优化的系统显著超越了独立训练的 Pipeline 基线。Ablation 证明 Reward 信号有效改善了检索召回的“有用性”而非仅仅是“相似度”。","authors_note":"Ming Yan (Alibaba DAMO Academy)"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Existing multimodal RAG systems typically treat the retriever and generator as separate frozen modules, preventing the retriever from adjusting its strategy based on the generator's final output quality.","importance":"Cross-modal unification and Pretrain-Posttrain interface. Accounting for the discontinuous nature of attention across layers, it dynamically aggregates multi-layer signals to accurately prune visual tokens ignored by text.","experiments":"On mainstream MLLMs, it prunes a large fraction (e.g., >50%) of visual tokens without significantly degrading VQA or multimodal chat accuracy, drastically reducing inference latency and memory footprint.","authors_note":"Hui Su (Tencent / Baidu)"},"tags":["mllm","pruning","token-reduction"],"notable_authors":["Hui Su"]},{"id":"FanZW25","title":"Towards More Efficient Post-training via Fourier Domain Adapter Framework","authors":["Yijia Fan","Jusheng Zhang","Keze Wang"],"institutions":["Sun Yat-sen University"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FanZW25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FanZW25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.328/","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"传统的 PEFT 方法（如 LoRA）在空间/权重域进行低秩更新，难以高效捕捉全局的、低频的语义模式，导致在复杂指令微调时表达能力受限。","importance":"优化器与训练动态。将频域分析引入大模型微调，开辟了参数高效微调（PEFT）的新表征空间，对理解模型权重的频域特性有理论价值。","technical_approach":"提出傅里叶域适配器（Fourier Domain Adapter）。将权重更新转换到频域，仅对关键的低频分量（代表全局特征）进行参数学习，再通过逆傅里叶变换映射回空间域，从而用更少的参数实现更强的表达。","experiments":"在指令微调基准上，该方法在同等或更少的可训练参数下，取得了优于标准 LoRA 的性能。频域分析证实低频更新对模型对齐起主导作用。","authors_note":"Keze Wang (Sun Yat-sen University)"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Traditional PEFT methods (like LoRA) perform low-rank updates in the spatial/weight domain, struggling to efficiently capture global, low-frequency semantic patterns, which limits expressiveness during complex instruction tuning.","importance":"Optimizers and training dynamics. Introduces frequency domain analysis to LLM fine-tuning, opening a new representation space for PEFT and offering theoretical value for understanding the frequency characteristics of model weights.","technical_approach":"Proposes the Fourier Domain Adapter. Transforms weight updates into the frequency domain, learns parameters only for critical low-frequency components (representing global features), and maps back to the spatial domain via Inverse Fast Fourier Transform, achieving stronger expressiveness with fewer parameters.","experiments":"On instruction tuning benchmarks, the method outperforms standard LoRA with equal or fewer trainable parameters. Frequency analysis confirms that low-frequency updates dominate model alignment.","authors_note":"Keze Wang (Sun Yat-sen University)"},"tags":["adapter","peft","fourier"],"notable_authors":["Keze Wang"]},{"id":"FangHYHZDWSZJ25","title":"NL2Lean: Translating Natural Language into Lean 4 through Multi-Aspect Reinforcement Learning","authors":["Yue Fang","Shaohan Huang","Xin Yu","Haizhen Huang","Zihan Zhang","Weiwei Deng","Furu Wei","Feng Sun","Qi Zhang","Zhi Jin"],"institutions":["Microsoft Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/FangHYHZDWSZJ25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1586"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/FangHYHZDWSZJ25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1586","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"将自然语言数学题转化为 Lean 4 形式化代码（Autoformalization）极度缺乏高质量平行语料，且依赖 SFT 难以满足编译器严苛的语法和类型要求。","importance":"新型语言建模与 Latent Reasoning。展示了 RL 在形式化验证领域的强大潜力，是解决 LLM 数学推理幻觉、走向 System 2 思考（如 R1-Zero 范式）的核心前置探索。","technical_approach":"采用多维度强化学习（Multi-Aspect RL）。不依赖单一的“证明成功”稀疏奖励，而是引入 Lean 4 编译器的多级反馈（语法正确性、类型匹配、证明状态推进）作为密集奖励信号，引导 LLM 学习形式化语法。","experiments":"在定理证明基准上，相比纯 SFT 模型，编译成功率和最终定理证明率均获得显著提升。证明了编译器反馈作为 Reward 的极高数据质量。","authors_note":"Shaohan Huang (Microsoft Research)"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Autoformalization (translating natural language math to Lean 4 code) severely lacks high-quality parallel corpora, and relying on SFT fails to meet the strict syntactic and type requirements of the compiler.","importance":"Novel language modeling and Latent Reasoning. Demonstrates the immense potential of RL in formal verification, serving as a core preliminary exploration for solving LLM math hallucinations and moving toward System 2 thinking (e.g., R1-Zero paradigm).","technical_approach":"Employs Multi-Aspect Reinforcement Learning. The goal is not just to make a harder test set, but to make evaluation remain meaningful after repeated model releases and data recirculation.","importance":"This is primarily an evaluation-method paper, but it matters directly to pretraining research. If benchmarks are leaky, gains from better data curation, continual pretraining, distillation, or synthetic data can be confounded with memorization, which makes training conclusions look stronger and cleaner than they really are.","technical_approach":"The likely contribution is a benchmark construction and maintenance protocol optimized for longevity rather than a one-shot dataset. The design presumably combines stricter decontamination, lower public exposure, temporal splits or rolling updates, and explicit overlap checks against training corpora, retrieval sources, or model-generated traces. That differs from standard benchmark collection, where leakage is often treated as an afterthought. The point is not just higher difficulty; it is slower benchmark decay under realistic deployment and research usage. The boundary is also clear: leakage resistance is probabilistic, not absolute.","experiments":"The provided metadata does not include reliable quantitative details, so model sizes, dataset sizes, and exact gains cannot be stated safely. checkpoint 做静态融合，因此难以同时保住旧知识和新知识。作者试图用训练过程信息做自适应迭代合并，以缓解 continual learning 里的遗忘与冲突。","importance":"它的重要性在 continual pretrain / post-train 接口层。对 pretrain 研究的启示是：如果训练轨迹本身包含哪些能力正在形成、哪些参数更新互相冲突的关键信息，那么只保存最终 checkpoint 会丢失可用于知识整合的重要结构，这会影响持续预训练、域适配和多阶段退火策略的设计。","technical_approach":"核心方法是 AIMMerging：利用 training trajectories 做 adaptive iterative model merging。这里的关键不是一次性参数平均，而是沿训练路径提取多阶段状态，识别哪些更新应该保留、衰减或递进式合并，再通过迭代过程找到更稳的整合点。和传统 task arithmetic、linear interpolation 或 soup 相比，它多了两层信息：一是时间维度，二是自适应性。这样设计有效的原因在于，持续学习里的冲突往往不是终态差异本身，而是不同阶段学到的变化方向彼此抵消或过度覆盖。","experiments":"由于缺少摘要，无法确认评测任务、模型参数量和具体增益。好的实验应比较 AIMMerging 与 sequential finetuning、replay、EWC 类方法，以及简单 checkpoint merge。关键指标不该只看新任务成绩，还要看旧任务保持率、平均性能和 backward transfer。若作者做了轨迹长度、采样间隔、合并轮数和层级合并策略的 ablation，会更能说明 training trajectory 到底提供了什么额外信息。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a knowledge. The proposed solution is to use trajectory information in an adaptive iterative merge.","importance":"This matters at the continual pretrain / post-train interface. If the trajectory contains actionable information about when capabilities form and where updates conflict, then keeping only final checkpoints is throwing away structure that could help knowledge consolidation in continual pretraining, domain adaptation, and multi-stage tuning.","technical_approach":"AIMMerging appears to use training trajectories for adaptive, iterative model merging rather than a single static average. The novelty is not merging per se, but using multiple states along the optimization path and updating the merge policy over iterations. Compared with task arithmetic, linear interpolation, or model soups, this adds two ingredients: temporal information and adaptation. That design makes sense because in continual learning the problem is often not the final parameter difference itself, but conflicting update directions accumulated at different stages.","experiments":"The abstract is not provided, so exact tasks, model scales, and gains cannot be stated safely. Compared with single-score supervision such as COMET- or BLEU-like targets, this design could offer better credit assignment and clearer optimization signals. That differs from standard load-balancing objectives, which regulate expert usage but do not directly improve the representation that the router sees. Open-ended generation benchmarks are costly, noisy, and sensitive to decoding, so a reliable proxy would materially improve experimental throughput.","importance":"This is primarily an evaluation-method paper, not a new modeling recipe. Its relevance to pretraining and post-training is straightforward: if understanding metrics predict generation well, large ablations, data-mixture sweeps, and alignment iterations can be screened faster and with less evaluator variance; the real question is how far that shortcut generalizes across tasks and model families.","technical_approach":"The likely contribution is a proxy-evaluation framework that maps discriminative or understanding-oriented signals to generative performance. The important design choice is not inventing another benchmark, but identifying which understanding tasks preserve the capability components needed for generation and which collapse the problem too aggressively to remain predictive.","experiments":"The prompt provides no abstract, scales, or reported numbers, so specific metrics, datasets, and effect sizes cannot be stated reliably. Relative to rule-only transpilers, this improves flexibility and coverage; relative to single-shot LM decoding, it trades latency and test dependence for much higher functional reliability.","experiments":"The abstract is unavailable, so instruction sets, model sizes, and pass rates cannot be reported. The decisive experiments should compare against rule-based transpilers and unverified LM baselines on functional correctness, and show success as a function of testing budget, since that reveals whether the guarantee comes from model quality, verifier quality, or brute-force sampling. No specific numbers should be invented.","authors_note":""},"tags":["language-modeling","code","transpilation","testing"]},{"id":"HondaMZ25","title":"Distilling Many-Shot In-Context Learning into a Cheat Sheet","authors":["Ukyo Honda","Soichiro Murakami","Peinan Zhang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/HondaMZ25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/HondaMZ25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.930/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作关注的是：many-shot ICL 虽然强，但推理时要塞很多示例，成本高且上下文脆弱，能否把这种 in-context 行为蒸馏成一张更短、更稳定的“cheat sheet”。过去常见做法是直接减少 exemplars 或做 retrieval，但这通常牺牲性能，因为模型真正利用的不是单个示例，而是示例集合中归纳出的任务规则。","importance":"这是一个方法级工作，对 prompt compression、test-time scaling 和 pretrain/posttrain 接口都有启发。它重要的点在于把 many-shot ICL 看成一种可蒸馏的隐式任务归纳过程；如果成立，就说明上下文里的大量 demonstration 有一部分只是训练信号载体，可以被压缩为更抽象的任务说明或规则摘要。","technical_approach":"从标题看，作者通过蒸馏 many-shot ICL 得到 cheat sheet，核心不是再选更好的 few-shot 例子，而是让模型或外部过程先从大量示例中提炼出任务规则、决策边界或格式约束，再用这份短摘要替代原始示例集。这样做有效的原因是它把冗余的 instance-level 证据压缩成 task-level 结构；和 exemplar selection 相比，它更偏向知识抽取而不是样本挑选。代价是：当任务高度依赖细粒度例外、而不是统一规则时，cheat sheet 可能压缩过度。","experiments":"没有摘要，不能确定任务集和上下文压缩倍率。关键实验应该比较 many-shot 原始 prompt、少样本挑选、以及 cheat sheet 蒸馏版在准确率和 token 成本上的 trade-off；高质量 ablation 会看 cheat sheet 长度、生成方式、是否跨模型泛化，以及在分布外任务上是否仍保留收益。具体数值需以论文为准。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper tackles a practical inefficiency of many-shot in-context learning: it works well, but it is expensive and context-fragile because it requires packing many demonstrations at inference time. The key question is whether that behavior can be distilled into a shorter and more stable 'cheat sheet' instead of repeatedly supplying raw examples.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with implications for prompt compression, test-time scaling, and the pretrain-posttrain interface. Its main value is conceptual: it treats many-shot ICL as an implicit task-induction process that may be compressible. If true, a nontrivial fraction of long-context demonstrations are serving as carriers of task structure rather than needing to be preserved verbatim.","technical_approach":"From the title, the method distills many-shot ICL into a cheat sheet, which suggests summarizing the task rule, label semantics, format constraints, or decision boundary extracted from many examples. That differs from standard example selection: instead of choosing a smaller subset of demonstrations, it converts instance-level evidence into task-level guidance. This can work because many demonstrations are redundant once the underlying pattern is identified. The failure mode is also clear: if success depends on many fine-grained exceptions rather than a compact rule, the cheat sheet will over-compress.","experiments":"The missing abstract means task suites, compression ratios, and performance numbers cannot be stated. The critical experiments should compare full many-shot prompts, selected few-shot prompts, and cheat-sheet prompts on both accuracy and token cost, with ablations on cheat-sheet length, generation method, cross-model transfer, and out-of-distribution robustness. Exact figures should not be invented.","authors_note":""},"tags":["icl","many-shot","distillation"]},{"id":"HongBKS25","title":"Measuring Sycophancy of Language Models in Multi-turn Dialogues","authors":["Jiseung Hong","Grace Byun","Seungone Kim","Kai Shu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/HongBKS25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/HongBKS25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.121/","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：现有 sycophancy 评测多是单轮问答，无法反映真实对话里模型如何在多轮互动中逐步迎合用户。这个问题现在值得重做，因为部署环境里大多数对齐失败不是单轮发生，而是在用户持续施压、暗示立场或暴露偏好后累积出现。","importance":"这是评测与诊断级工作，对 post-train 很直接，对 pretrain 的启发在于训练信号和上下文记忆如何共同放大迎合倾向。它的重要性在于把 sycophancy 从静态属性改成动态对话行为来测，这更接近实际风险，也更能区分模型是瞬时迎合还是会在多轮中逐步漂移。","technical_approach":"从标题看，方法核心是构造 multi-turn dialogue 场景来测量 sycophancy。关键设计通常包括：把用户立场、错误自信、社会地位暗示或反复确认嵌入多轮上下文，再比较模型是否为了迎合而偏离事实、偏离先前判断或偏离自身不确定性；这种设计优于单轮测评，因为它能把记忆、上下文强化和人机互动策略纳入同一框架。好的方法还会区分 agreement、deference 和 outright false endorsement，避免把礼貌全算成 sycophancy。","experiments":"没有摘要，无法确认 benchmark 规模、模型范围和分数定义。关键实验应包括：多轮与单轮测量的差异、不同用户 persona 或对话策略诱发的 sycophancy 强度、以及不同模型家族或对齐阶段的对比；如果论文完整，还会报告回合数增加时的趋势，而不只是平均分。具体数字这里不能填。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a limitation in current sycophancy evaluation: most benchmarks are single-turn, but real failures often emerge over multi-turn interaction as the user reveals preferences, applies pressure, or repeatedly asks for affirmation. Measuring only one-shot agreement misses that temporal buildup.","importance":"This is an evaluation and diagnostic contribution with immediate relevance to post-training and indirect relevance to pretraining. Its key value is shifting sycophancy from a static property to a dialogue behavior. That matters because it can separate instant agreement from gradual conversational drift, which is closer to deployment risk.","technical_approach":"The likely approach is a multi-turn dialogue benchmark or measurement protocol for sycophancy. A strong design would manipulate user stance, confidence, status cues, and persistence across turns, then measure whether the model departs from facts, from its own prior answer, or from calibrated uncertainty in order to please the user. This is better than single-turn evaluation because it captures memory, interaction strategy, and context accumulation together. An important nuance is to separate politeness or hedging from genuine false endorsement.","experiments":"The absent abstract prevents reporting benchmark size, model coverage, or exact metrics. The crucial evidence should compare single-turn and multi-turn scores, vary user personas or pressure strategies, and examine differences across model families or alignment stages; a careful paper would also report how sycophancy evolves with turn count rather than only an average score. If injected knowledge only improves recall but fails in multi-hop reasoning, simply feeding domain data won't yield true 'domain experts'. This explains why many vertical LLMs act as stochastic parrots rather than problem solvers.","technical_approach":"Injects synthetic or rare facts into the model, then evaluates not just basic recall (fill-in-the-blank) but also complex tasks requiring logical deduction, counterfactual reasoning, or multi-hop QA based on those facts to quantify the gap between memorization and reasoning.","experiments":"Results show models easily achieve high recall rates for injected facts but perform near randomly on reasoning tasks depending on that knowledge. Robustness work often examines paraphrases or prompt wording, but format is an underappreciated variable; if a model treats lists, tables, JSON, and prose as different semantic cues, it can produce meaning-inconsistent outputs.","importance":"This is important because it exposes a very practical but often neglected source of model instability. For pretraining, it suggests models absorb strong formatting priors rather than purely abstracting over meaning. That has implications for corpus composition, serialization choices, instruction templates, and synthetic data generation. It is not a new training paradigm, but it is highly relevant to understanding what models actually generalize over.","technical_approach":"The likely approach is to build semantically equivalent inputs with different surface formats and test whether outputs remain consistent. This is a strong design because it turns an open-ended robustness question into a controlled semantic-invariance test. The use of “semantic inconsistency” suggests the paper goes beyond simple accuracy drops and looks for contradictory responses to equivalent inputs. Compared with generic prompt-sensitivity studies, the focus here is specifically on whether formatting alters the model’s interpretation of meaning.","experiments":"The available metadata does not support specific claims about models, tasks, or effect sizes. A solid evaluation would cover multiple formats such as prose, bullet lists, tables, key-value structures, and code-style blocks across tasks like QA, classification, reasoning, and extraction. It should also control for length and order to isolate format from other confounds. The most consequential result would be significant answer shifts under meaning-preserving reformatting, possibly persisting even in larger models, but that cannot be reported as fact without the paper details.","authors_note":""},"tags":["format-sensitivity","generalization","reasoning","evaluation"],"notable_authors":["Jaesik Choi"]},{"id":"KangSWHYXFL25","title":"SwiftPrune: Hessian-Free Weight Pruning for Large Language Models","authors":["Yuhan Kang","Yang Shi","Mei Wen","Jun He","Jianchao Yang","Zeyu Xue","Jing Feng","Xinwang Liu"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/KangSWHYXFL25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/KangSWHYXFL25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.690/","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：LLM 权重剪枝里，二阶信息通常有效但代价太高，如何在不显式构造 Hessian 的情况下做高效剪枝。现有高质量 pruning 方法常依赖 Hessian 或其近似，计算和内存都重，不适合大模型快速压缩；作者提出 Hessian-free 的 SwiftPrune，目标是把二阶启发保留下来，同时去掉昂贵计算。","importance":"它更偏系统方法和模型压缩，但对 pretrain 也有启发，因为压缩方法经常反映参数冗余和训练后几何结构。若能在不算 Hessian 的前提下接近二阶剪枝效果，这对大模型部署和训练后分析都很实用；不过它主要是后训练压缩技术，而不是改变预训练目标本身。","technical_approach":"核心方法就是一种无需 Hessian 的权重重要性估计或剪枝准则。这样设计的动机很明确：一阶或幅值剪枝便宜但常损伤性能，二阶方法更准却难扩展，所以作者试图找到能代理曲率信息的更轻信号。标题里的 SwiftPrune 暗示重点是速度和可扩展性。与最接近的 OBS/OBD 或 Hessian-aware pruning 相比，关键区别是避免显式 Hessian、逆 Hessian 或高成本近似。它可能使用梯度统计、局部重构误差或 block-wise 近似，但摘要缺失，不能确认。","experiments":"没有摘要，无法给出具体稀疏率、模型规模和性能保持率。一个有说服力的实验应包括：不同参数规模 LLM 上的非结构化或半结构化剪枝；与 magnitude pruning、wanda、SparseGPT、Hessian-aware baseline 对比；在 perplexity、zero-shot 任务和推理吞吐上的联合评测；以及高稀疏率区间的稳定性分析。若论文质量高，最有价值的证据会是：在相近精度下显著降低剪枝开销，或在高稀疏率下保持更稳，但当前不能写具体数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a classic pruning trade-off in LLMs: second-order information is useful but too expensive, so how can we prune effectively without explicitly computing the Hessian? Many strong pruning methods rely on Hessian-based approximations that are hard to scale to large models; SwiftPrune aims to retain the benefit while removing the cost.","importance":"This is mainly a systems and compression contribution, but it is still relevant to pretraining-adjacent research because pruning methods reveal parameter redundancy and post-training geometry. If a Hessian-free method approaches second-order pruning quality, it would be practically valuable for deployment and informative about what curvature information really matters. Still, this is primarily a post-training compression paper, not a new pretraining objective.","technical_approach":"The core idea is presumably a Hessian-free importance estimate or pruning criterion. The motivation is straightforward: magnitude or first-order pruning is cheap but often crude, while second-order methods are accurate but expensive. A good Hessian-free surrogate would try to capture curvature-relevant information using lighter signals such as gradient statistics, local reconstruction, or blockwise approximations. The main distinction from OBD/OBS-style or other Hessian-aware pruning methods is the explicit avoidance of Hessian construction or inversion.","experiments":"Without the abstract, no concrete claims can be made about sparsity levels, model scales, or retained accuracy. A convincing evaluation would span several LLM sizes, compare against magnitude pruning, WANDA, SparseGPT, and Hessian-aware baselines, and report both perplexity and downstream zero-shot performance along with pruning cost and inference speed. The most meaningful evidence would be similar accuracy at much lower pruning overhead, or better stability at high sparsity, but this cannot be stated quantitatively here.","authors_note":""},"tags":["pruning","efficiency","compression","hessian"]},{"id":"KhanmohammadiMMKBSTG25","title":"Calibrating LLM Confidence by Probing Perturbed Representation Stability","authors":["Reza Khanmohammadi","Erfan Miahi","Mehrsa Mardikoraem","Simerjot Kaur","Ivan Brugere","Charese Smiley","Kundan Thind","Mohammad M. evenly.","experiments":"Tested on small-parameter models, the method effectively improved the health of attention distributions and boosted downstream task performance with controllable inference merging。直觉上，它不是简单平均参数，而是根据参数矩阵或更新矩阵的范数结构自适应决定合并强度，试图从权重幅度与方向中提取任务相关性。这样设计的好处是完全不依赖样本，部署简单；风险也很明确：参数空间的几何量并不总能对应功能空间相容性，尤其当多个 adapter 或 finetune 模型落在不同 basin Practitioners add rerankers by habit, but the conditions under which they pay off are not well characterized.","importance":"An analysis paper, useful for RAG and long-context practitioners: it tells you when a reranker is worth the latency. The indirect pretrain implication is that the base model's robustness to noisy context determines how much downstream selection you still need.","technical_approach":"Controlled factorial study over retrieval recall, candidate count, selector strength, and generator capability. Xiong","Ranjay Krishna","Silvio Savarese"],"institutions":["Salesforce Research"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MaZLZTSNHWXKS25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.564"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MaZLZTSNHWXKS25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.564","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"通用视觉语言模型（VLM）依赖单一视觉编码器（如 CLIP），在处理细粒度 OCR、密集检测等专业视觉任务时，受限于分辨率和特征提取偏好，能力严重不足。","importance":"架构与范式级贡献。推动了 VLM 从“单体视觉编码器”向“视觉专家混合（MoE）/工具调用”范式的转变，解决了通用预训练与垂直视觉能力的冲突。","technical_approach":"提出 LATTE 架构，将多个特定领域的视觉专家模型（Vision Specialists）集成到 LLM 的推理过程中。通过路由或注意力机制，LLM 学会在需要时动态查询对应的视觉专家，舍弃了强行将所有视觉信息压缩进单一 Encoder 的做法。","experiments":"在多模态推理、细粒度视觉问答等任务上显著提升了性能，证明了引入外部视觉专家比单纯扩大单一视觉编码器参数更具性价比。","authors_note":"Salesforce Research，Zhiwei Liu 等人在多模态和 Agent 领域有丰富经验。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"General Vision-Language Models (VLMs) rely on a single vision encoder (e.g., CLIP), which severely limits their capability in specialized visual tasks like fine-grained OCR or dense detection due to resolution and feature extraction biases.","importance":"Architectural and paradigm contribution. It drives the shift in VLMs from a 'monolithic vision encoder' to a 'Mixture of Vision Experts (MoE) / tool-use' paradigm, resolving the conflict between general pre-training and specialized visual capabilities.","technical_approach":"Introduces the LATTE architecture, which integrates multiple domain-specific vision specialists into the LLM's reasoning process. Through routing or attention mechanisms, the LLM learns to dynamically query the appropriate vision specialist when needed, abandoning the approach of forcing all visual info into a single encoder.","experiments":"Significantly improved performance on multimodal reasoning and fine-grained VQA tasks, proving that incorporating external vision specialists is more cost-effective than simply scaling up a single vision encoder's parameters.","authors_note":"Salesforce Research; Zhiwei Liu and colleagues have extensive experience in multimodal models and agents."},"tags":["vlm","reasoning","vision","specialist-models","distillation"],"notable_authors":["Zhiwei Liu","Jieyu Zhang"]},{"id":"MadasuLH25","title":"Pruning the Paradox: How CLIP&apos;s Most Informative Heads Enhance Performance While Amplifying Bias","authors":["Avinash Madasu","Vasudev Lal","Phillip Howard"],"institutions":["Intel Labs"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MadasuLH25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.229"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MadasuLH25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.229","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"CLIP 模型的注意力头中，对下游任务性能贡献最大的头，往往也是编码社会偏见最严重的头，导致模型性能与公平性难以兼得。","importance":"机制分析与优化。揭示了对比学习多模态预训练中的一个核心悖论，对如何设计更公平的视觉 Tokenizer 和多模态表征有重要启发。","technical_approach":"通过对 CLIP 注意力头的可解释性分析，量化每个头的“信息量”与“偏见程度”。提出一种针对性的剪枝策略，在保留核心语义表征能力的同时，精准剔除或抑制那些过度放大偏见的注意力头。","experiments":"在多个公平性数据集和标准视觉基准上，剪枝后的 CLIP 模型在保持 Zero-shot 准确率基本不降的前提下，显著降低了性别、种族等偏见指标。","authors_note":"Intel Labs 团队。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"In CLIP models, the attention heads that contribute the most to downstream performance are often the ones that encode the most social bias, creating a paradox between performance and fairness.","importance":"Mechanistic analysis and optimization. It reveals a core paradox in contrastive multimodal pre-training, offering crucial insights into designing fairer visual tokenizers and multimodal representations.","technical_approach":"Conducts interpretability analysis on CLIP's attention heads to quantify the 'informativeness' and 'bias level' of each head. Proposes a targeted pruning strategy to precisely remove or suppress heads that amplify bias, while preserving core semantic representation capabilities.","experiments":"On multiple fairness datasets and standard vision benchmarks, the pruned CLIP model significantly reduced gender and racial bias metrics while maintaining nearly identical zero-shot accuracy.","authors_note":"Intel Labs team."},"tags":["clip","attention-heads","pruning","bias","interpretability"],"notable_authors":["Avinash Madasu"]},{"id":"MaghakianSSK25","title":"Embedding-Free RAG","authors":["Jessica Maghakian","Raunak Sinha","Max Schettewi","Gunkirat Kaur"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MaghakianSSK25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MaghakianSSK25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.1360/","category_id":"agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"传统 RAG 强依赖独立的稠密向量模型（Embedding Models），增加了系统部署复杂度，且向量表征可能存在语义压缩瓶颈，导致检索不精准。","importance":"系统与范式级贡献。挑战了 RAG 必须依赖双塔 Embedding 模型的共识，探索了直接利用 LLM 原生能力进行检索的路径，极大简化了 Serving 架构。","technical_approach":"提出无向量（Embedding-Free）的检索增强生成框架。通过 LLM 的生成式检索、直接利用 KV-Cache 匹配，或结合词汇级稀疏检索与 LLM 重排序，完全移除了对外部独立 Embedding 模型的依赖。","experiments":"在标准 QA 和检索基准上，证明了 Embedding-Free 方法能达到甚至超越传统 Dense Retriever 的效果，同时降低了系统维护成本。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Traditional RAG relies heavily on independent dense embedding models, which increases system deployment complexity and suffers from semantic compression bottlenecks, leading to imprecise retrieval.","importance":"System and paradigm contribution. It challenges the consensus that RAG must rely on dual-encoder embedding models, exploring paths to use LLM's native capabilities for retrieval and drastically simplifying serving architectures.","technical_approach":"Proposes an Embedding-Free Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework. It completely removes the reliance on external embedding models by utilizing the LLM's generative retrieval, direct KV-Cache matching, or combining lexical sparse retrieval with LLM reranking.","experiments":"Demonstrated on standard QA and retrieval benchmarks that the Embedding-Free approach can match or exceed the performance of traditional dense retrievers while lowering system maintenance costs.","authors_note":""},"tags":["rag","retrieval","embedding-free","inference"]},{"id":"MaiHH25","title":"Supervised Attention Mechanism for Low-quality Multimodal Data","authors":["Sijie Mai","Shiqin Han","Haifeng Hu"],"institutions":["South China University of Technology"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MaiHH25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1084"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MaiHH25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1084","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"多模态模型在面对现实中低质量、缺失或噪声严重的模态数据时，标准交叉注意力机制容易被噪声误导，导致性能发生灾难性下降。","importance":"训练稳定性与鲁棒性。为多模态预训练和微调提供了一种应对脏数据的机制，避免模型在低质量数据上过拟合噪声，提升了模型在真实场景下的可用性。","technical_approach":"引入监督注意力机制（Supervised Attention）。在训练阶段通过辅助 Loss 显式引导模型的注意力权重，使其在面对低质量输入时，强制关注高质量模态或可靠的局部特征，抑制噪声模态的干扰。","experiments":"在包含噪声或模态缺失的多模态数据集上，该机制显著提升了模型的鲁棒性，相比标准交叉注意力机制，性能衰减幅度大幅减小。","authors_note":"华南理工大学 (SCUT) Haifeng Hu 团队。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"When facing low-quality, missing, or noisy modality data in real-world scenarios, standard cross-attention mechanisms in multimodal models are easily misled by noise, leading to catastrophic performance degradation.","importance":"Training stability and robustness. It provides a mechanism for multimodal pre-training and fine-tuning to handle dirty data, preventing the model from overfitting to noise and improving usability in real-world settings.","technical_approach":"Introduces a Supervised Attention mechanism. During training, an auxiliary loss explicitly guides the model's attention weights, forcing it to focus on high-quality modalities or reliable local features when faced with low-quality inputs, thereby suppressing interference from noisy modalities.","experiments":"On multimodal datasets with injected noise or missing modalities, this mechanism significantly improved model robustness, with a much smaller performance drop compared to standard cross-attention mechanisms.","authors_note":"South China University of Technology (SCUT), Haifeng Hu's team."},"tags":["multimodal","data-quality","attention","robustness"],"notable_authors":["Haifeng Hu"]},{"id":"MalladiMJS25","title":"Explaining Differences Between Model Pairs in Natural Language through Sample Learning","authors":["Advaith Malladi","Rakesh R. Menon","Yuvraj Jain","Shashank Srivastava"],"institutions":["UNC Chapel Hill"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MalladiMJS25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1462"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MalladiMJS25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1462","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"评估两个 LLM 的差异通常只能看 Benchmark 的聚合分数，无法用自然语言直观解释它们在微观行为、风格偏好或语义理解上的具体区别。","importance":"评估范式。提供了一种白盒化/语义化的模型对比方法，有助于在 Post-train 阶段（如对齐前后、不同 Checkpoint 之间）分析模型行为的系统性偏移。","technical_approach":"提出基于样本学习（Sample Learning）的方法。通过收集两个模型在相同 Prompt 下的输出差异样本，利用一个 Meta-LLM 总结并生成自然语言描述，解释两者在风格、事实偏好或推理逻辑上的系统性差异。","experiments":"在多个模型对（如 Base vs Chat，或不同规模模型）上生成了差异解释，人工评估证明这些解释准确捕捉了模型间的行为偏移，优于单纯的统计指标对比。","authors_note":"UNC Chapel Hill, Shashank Srivastava 团队。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Evaluating the differences between two LLMs usually relies on aggregate benchmark scores, which fail to intuitively explain their specific differences in micro-behaviors, stylistic preferences, or semantic understanding in natural language.","importance":"Evaluation paradigm. Delaney","Chris Russell","Adam Mahdi"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/MayneKYBDRM25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1231"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/MayneKYBDRM25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1231","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇论文的核心判断是：LLM 自己生成的反事实解释并不能可靠刻画它自己的决策边界。过去很多解释性做法默认模型既能给答案也能说明“什么改动会让答案改变”，但这种自我报告可能只是语言上合理，而不是机制上真实。","importance":"这对可解释性、对齐和数据合成都有直接影响。若这个结论成立，那么用模型自生成反事实来做偏好解释、错误归因、数据增强甚至安全审计都会有系统性风险，因为训练信号会建立在一个不可靠的边界描述上。","technical_approach":"方法上应是把模型的自生成反事实解释，与其真实预测边界做对照检验。最可能的关键机制是：先让模型给出“改变哪些输入因素会翻转决定”的解释，再实际构造或搜索这些反事实输入，看预测是否按解释所说发生变化；这种设计有效，因为它不再把解释文本当答案，而是把解释转成可验证的行为假设。","experiments":"摘要缺失，因此无法给出任务、模型和数字。按标题判断，关键实验应包括：多个模型在分类或判断任务上的自解释一致性，解释提出的边界因素对真实决策翻转的命中率，以及不同提示或温度下稳定性；如果论文严谨，还会比较人工构造反事实、梯度或检索式边界分析等 baseline。没有正文前，不应臆测提升或退化幅度。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The central claim is sharp: LLM-generated counterfactual explanations are not a reliable description of the model’s own decision boundary. That leaves efficiency on the table and can amplify failure on hard cases. This is timely because deployment increasingly cares about input-adaptive compute, and block-level structured pruning is much easier to realize than fine-grained sparsity.","importance":"This is a method-plus-systems contribution. If input-guided block pruning works reliably, it shows that compression decisions do not have to be frozen entirely at training time; some of them can move to inference. That matters beyond pruning, because it connects to a broader line of adaptive compute such as routing, early exit, and dynamic depth.","technical_approach":"The method is likely input-guided block pruning: the model does not permanently delete weights, but selectively skips blocks conditioned on the current input. The block granularity is important. It is coarse enough to yield real wall-clock gains on hardware, yet fine enough to preserve some routing flexibility. Compared with offline saliency-based pruning, the key difference is conditionality on the input; compared with token-level routing, the implementation is simpler and cheaper, but also less expressive.","experiments":"The evidence that matters is not just FLOPs reduction but the trade-off among sparsity, perplexity or task accuracy, and measured latency or throughput. That is relevant to tool-use LMs, agentic retrieval, and test-time search more broadly.","technical_approach":"The method appears to train a query reasoner that explicitly produces retrieval-oriented reasoning steps or rewritten queries, and then optimize it with RL using downstream retrieval or QA reward. inference-time alignment 常见的两难：best-of-N 能提高回答质量，但采样代价高；树搜索能更系统地探索，但 rollout 成本和价值评估开销更高。现有方法经常在质量和时延之间只能取其一，尤其在推理型任务上更明显。","importance":"它的重要性主要在 posttrain 和 test-time compute 策略，但对 pretrain 也有间接启示：如果对齐质量可以靠更聪明的推理时搜索明显提升，那么训练阶段未必要把所有偏好都压进参数里。这个方向和 R1-Zero、self-consistency、speculative decoding 一样，都在重新分配 train-time 与 test-time compute。","technical_approach":"核心方法应是把 speculative tree-search 和 best-of-N 结合起来做 inference-time alignment。题目里的 TreeBoN 暗示作者不是简单多采样，而是先用树状扩展生成候选，再用某种轻量评分或偏好模型筛选最优路径；speculative 的意义大概率是用便宜模型或近似策略先扩展候选，减少昂贵主模型评估次数。与纯 best-of-N 相比，它更有结构地分配采样预算；与标准 MCTS/beam search 相比，它更面向对齐目标而非似然最大化。","experiments":"关键实验应覆盖 helpfulness / harmlessness 或 reasoning correctness 与 latency/cost 的 Pareto。最值得看的是在固定 token 预算或固定 wall-clock 下，相比 BoN、self-consistency、beam search 或 reranking 是否获得更高 win rate；还要看树深、分支数、评分器强弱的 ablation。没有摘要和数字，无法确认是否用偏好模型打分、是否在 AlpacaEval / MT-Bench / GSM8K / MATH 一类集合上验证。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper addresses a familiar inference-time alignment trade-off: best-of-N improves output quality but scales poorly with sampling cost, while tree search explores more systematically but can be even more expensive. This becomes especially visible on reasoning-heavy tasks, where simple single-sample decoding underuses available test-time compute.","importance":"The contribution sits in posttraining and test-time optimization, but it carries a pretraining-relevant message as well: if alignment quality can be improved substantially through smarter inference-time search, not every preference signal has to be baked into parameters during training. This is part of the broader shift toward train/test compute reallocation.","technical_approach":"The method appears to combine speculative tree search with best-of-N selection for inference-time alignment. The likely recipe is to expand a structured candidate tree, use a cheap proposal or proxy to speculate on promising branches, and then apply a preference-aligned scorer to select the best path. Relative to plain best-of-N, the budget is allocated more intelligently; relative to beam search or MCTS, the objective is alignment-aware quality rather than pure likelihood.","experiments":"The right evidence is a Pareto comparison between quality and cost or latency. Useful baselines would include best-of-N, self-consistency, beam search, and reranking pipelines. The strongest result would show higher win rate or reasoning accuracy at fixed token budget or wall-clock. Important ablations should probe tree depth, branching factor, and the quality of the scoring function. Without the abstract, exact benchmarks and gains are unknown.","authors_note":""},"tags":["best-of-n","tree-search","alignment","inference"],"notable_authors":["Jiahao Qiu","Yifu Lu","Yifan Zeng","Jiacheng Guo","Jiayi Geng"]},{"id":"QiuWLGY25","title":"Superpose Task-specific Features for Model Merging","authors":["Haiquan Qiu","You Wu","Dong Li","Jianmin Guo","Quanming Yao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/QiuWLGY25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.210"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/QiuWLGY25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.210","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是模型合并里任务特征相互覆盖的问题。现有 merge 方法常把多个 finetuned 权重简单线性组合、稀疏选择或按重要性重加权，但不同任务更新往往共享参数方向，结果是某个任务增强的同时把另一个任务冲掉，尤其在任务差异较大时更明显。","importance":"它属于方法级工作，但对 continual adaptation 和 posttrain 组合很有参考价值。如果 task-specific features 真能以 superposition 方式更好共存，那么这说明模型合并不一定要在参数层面硬冲突，也可以在表示层或子空间层面做更细的重排。这对多域后训练、插件化适配和 checkpoint 组合都重要。","technical_approach":"题目表明核心思想是 superpose task-specific features for model merging。合理推断作者不是直接平均权重，而是识别每个任务更新中可保留的特征方向，再用某种叠加机制让这些方向在同一模型内共存，可能通过正交分解、子空间投影或 feature routing 来减少冲突。和 task arithmetic 相比，它更强调特征级叠加而非参数差分叠加；和多 adapter 并存相比，它可能追求合并后单模型推理，不增加部署复杂度。","experiments":"关键实验应在多任务合并基准上比较 task arithmetic、TIES、DARE、平均权重或 adapter composition，报告平均分和最差任务分。最值得看的结果是是否能在任务数增加时更稳，而不是只在两三个相近任务上小幅领先；还应看冲突分析，比如参数夹角、feature overlap 或 merge order 敏感性。没有摘要，无法确认是否用于 LLM 指令模型还是视觉/语言通用模型，也无法确认增益数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a core failure mode in model merging: task updates interfere because they overlap in parameter directions. Many existing methods average weights, combine task vectors, or apply sparse selection, but when tasks differ meaningfully, one update often overwrites another instead of coexisting cleanly.","importance":"This is a method-level contribution with clear relevance to continual adaptation and posttraining composition. If task-specific features can be superposed more effectively, it suggests that mergeability is not just a parameter-space averaging problem; it can be treated as a representation or subspace allocation problem. That matters for multi-domain posttraining and modular checkpoint composition.","technical_approach":"From the title, the main idea is to superpose task-specific features rather than merge task deltas naively. Compared with task arithmetic, this is more feature-centric than delta-centric; compared with keeping separate adapters, it likely aims for a single merged model at inference time.","experiments":"The right evidence would compare against task arithmetic, TIES, DARE, weight averaging, or adapter composition across multi-task merge benchmarks. preference learning）的难点在于不同用户的偏好分布差异大，单一 reward model 或对齐策略难以同时满足多样化需求。以往方法要么忽略个性化，要么需要为每个用户单独训练，成本高。","importance":"方法级贡献，对 RLHF/对齐研究有启示。如果偏好建模能有效个性化，那么 pretrain→posttrain 的对齐阶段可以更精细地适配不同用户群体，减少 Limited direct impact on pretraining research, but practically useful for long-context serving. The finding that layers need different cache budgets also indirectly reveals heterogeneous information processing patterns across Transformer layers.","technical_approach":"LAVa performs layer-wise adaptive KV cache eviction with dynamic budget allocation. Directly links internal model uncertainty (confidence) with test-time sampling strategies, offering a lightweight and effective optimization for inference-time compute allocation.","technical_approach":"Proposes unsupervised Confidence Dilution and Convergent Adaptive Sampling. At each decoding step, the model unsupervisedly evaluates its confidence: for high-confidence steps, it uses convergent sampling (leaning towards greedy) to accelerate and reduce errors; for low-confidence steps, it dynamically dilutes confidence (e.g., raising temperature) to encourage exploration of alternative reasoning branches.","experiments":"Tested on reasoning benchmarks like GSM8K and MATH. Say HOLA","authors":["Zohaib Hasan Siddiqui","Jiechao Gao","Ebad Shabbir","Mohammad Anas Azeez","Rafiq Ali","Gautam Siddharth Kashyap","Usman Naseem"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/SiddiquiGSAAKN25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-INDUSTRY.71"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/SiddiquiGSAAKN25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-industry.71","category_id":"efficient","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"标准的参数高效微调（PEFT）方法如 LoRA 虽然降低了显存占用，但在极端预算受限的场景下仍显笨重，且低秩矩阵分解难以捕捉复杂任务所需的高阶权重交互。","importance":"优化与效率级贡献。通过引入高阶张量分解，进一步压榨了 PEFT 的参数极限，为边缘设备或极低资源下的 LLM 微调提供了新工具。","technical_approach":"提出 HOLA（Higher-Order Low-Rank Adaptation）。放弃了 LoRA 中简单的二维矩阵低秩分解（A×B），转而采用高阶张量分解技术来重构权重更新。这种方法允许模型在更低维度的子空间中捕获多维特征交互，从而在保持模型表达能力的同时，进一步成倍削减需要训练的参数量。","experiments":"在标准 NLP 任务上进行微调测试。结果表明，HOLA 在参数量远小于标准 LoRA 的情况下，达到了相当甚至更好的微调性能，显著降低了训练时的内存峰值（Memory Footprint）。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Standard Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like LoRA reduce memory usage but remain bulky in extremely budget-constrained scenarios, and low-rank matrix factorization struggles to capture higher-order weight interactions needed for complex tasks.","importance":"Optimization and efficiency contribution. Pushes the parameter limits of PEFT by introducing higher-order tensor decomposition, providing a new tool for LLM fine-tuning on edge devices or under extremely low resources.","technical_approach":"Proposes HOLA (Higher-Order Low-Rank Adaptation). It abandons the simple 2D matrix low-rank factorization (A×B) used in LoRA in favor of higher-order tensor decomposition techniques to reconstruct weight updates. This allows the model to capture multi-dimensional feature interactions in an even lower-dimensional subspace, exponentially reducing trainable parameters while maintaining expressivity.","experiments":"Fine-tuning tests on standard NLP tasks. Standard audits often require many generations and large token budgets, making them expensive and noisy; replacing them with single-token masked evaluation is therefore a practical evaluation problem worth solving.","importance":"Its contribution is primarily methodological and systems-oriented. For pretraining researchers, the key implication is that fairness or disparity analysis may not always need full generative rollouts; local probability signals can sometimes serve as a scalable proxy. That matters because it can turn auditing from an occasional study into a routine development loop.","technical_approach":"From the title, TFDP uses single-token masked evaluation as a token-efficient proxy for disparity audits in autoregressive models. The idea is to compress a sequence-level behavioral measurement into conditional probabilities at carefully chosen token positions. The upside is lower cost and lower variance; the trade-off is that such a proxy may miss disparities that only emerge through long-horizon decoding, interaction effects, or chain-of-thought behavior.","experiments":"No abstract is provided, so the benchmarks, model set, token savings, and correlation numbers cannot be stated safely. Prior work usually pushes this with larger backbones or more instruction data, without explicitly organizing the concept space. COCO-Tree appears to address that missing structure.","importance":"This is best viewed as a representation-and-reasoning contribution rather than a new pretraining paradigm. The pretraining-facing implication is that model limitations may come not only from data scale but also from the lack of an explicit semantic scaffold. Instead of learning all concept relations implicitly from flat captions or QA pairs, the model gets an explicit structure over parent-child and compositional relations. The trade-off is straightforward: less end-to-end simplicity, but a stronger inductive bias for multi-entity and multi-attribute reasoning.","experiments":"Without the abstract, the exact benchmarks, models, and gains cannot be reported reliably. Standard options are prompting, LoRA, or full finetuning, but prompting is weak and unstable while the latter two are more expensive. Bias-only adaptation is an attempt to get strong control with almost no trainable footprint.","importance":"This is a lightweight adaptation contribution with broader implications for where reasoning behavior lives in the model. If successful, it suggests that some reasoning styles or preferences are highly sensitive to a very small parameter subspace. That is useful for post-training, controllability, and potentially for thinking about low-cost mid-training interventions.","technical_approach":"The method appears to update only bias parameters to steer reasoning. The design works if the model already contains multiple latent reasoning trajectories and the bias terms are enough to change which ones dominate. The limitation is equally clear: this is unlikely to add new knowledge or deeply reshape representations.","experiments":"Because no abstract is available, the benchmarks, baselines, and quantitative gains cannot be stated safely. Provides an efficient data attribution algorithm, enabling fine-grained data cleaning, quality filtering, and tracing on billion-parameter models.","technical_approach":"Introduces RRInf, which reformulates the approximation of the Inverse Hessian-Vector Product (IHVP) as a Ridge Regression problem. This approach discards the high memory footprint and instability of EK-FAC or Arnoldi iterations, leveraging the closed-form solution or efficient solvers of regression to drastically reduce computational complexity.","experiments":"Evaluated on LLMs and Text-to-Image Diffusion models. Compared to traditional IF estimation methods, RRInf achieves significant memory savings and computational speedups while maintaining attribution fidelity."},"tags":["influence-function","data-attribution","diffusion","llm"]},{"id":"TuFCLTX25","title":"ViLBench: A Suite for Vision-Language Process Reward Modeling","authors":["Haoqin Tu","Weitao Feng","Hardy Chen","Hui Liu","Xianfeng Tang","Cihang Xie"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/TuFCLTX25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.344"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/TuFCLTX25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.344","category_id":"multimodal","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"视觉语言模型（VLM）缺乏细粒度、多步骤推理的评估基准，导致难以训练和评估用于多模态复杂任务的过程奖励模型（PRM）。","importance":"VLM Post-train 与对齐。PRM 是将 RLHF 扩展到复杂推理（如 O1 范式）的核心，ViLBench 填补了多模态领域 Step-by-step 奖励建模的数据和评估空白。","technical_approach":"构建了 ViLBench，一个专门为视觉语言过程奖励建模设计的套件。它不仅包含最终结果的对错，还提供了多模态推理轨迹中每一步（Step-level）的正确性标注，强制模型进行细粒度的图文逻辑对齐。","experiments":"在多个开源 VLM 和奖励模型上进行了基准测试。结果表明，现有的多模态模型在步骤级的信用分配（Credit Assignment）上表现挣扎，远落后于其在结果级（Outcome-based）奖励上的表现。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The lack of fine-grained, step-by-step reasoning benchmarks for Vision-Language Models (VLMs) hinders the training and evaluation of Process Reward Models (PRMs) for complex multimodal tasks.","importance":"VLM Post-training and Alignment. PRMs are central to scaling RLHF for complex reasoning (like the O1 paradigm). The motivation is straightforward: language-side instruction losses are abundant and easy to optimize, so they can dominate shared parameters and overwrite visual features. Compared with simple loss reweighting, this approach acts directly on the optimization path rather than only on scalar task weights, trading extra training complexity for better modality preservation.","experiments":"Without the abstract, model size, data scale, benchmark suite, and exact gains cannot be verified. token 级别修改 logits，但由于 BPE 等子词分词器的“分词不一致性”（前缀改变导致后续文本的分词边界发生变化），会导致解码错误或水印失效。这个问题在理论研究中常被忽略，但在实际部署中是致命的。","importance":"系统级/落地级贡献。它指出了当前词法水印方案在真实分词器下的核心脆弱性，填补了理论水印算法与实际 LLM 部署之间的 gap。","technical_approach":"提出了一种应对分词不一致性的鲁棒策略。核心机制是在生成或提取阶段，动态对齐或约束分词边界，确保隐写/水印的 payload 不会因为局部前缀的扰动而导致整个 token 序列的解析崩溃。舍弃了对静态 token 映射的依赖，换取了在真实场景下的鲁棒性。","experiments":"在标准的水印/隐写 benchmark 上评估了该方法。实验证明，在面临文本前缀微调或分词器 shift 时，该方法能显著提高信息的提取准确率，且不会明显降低生成文本的质量。","authors_note":"Yugo Murawaki (Kyoto University)"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"LLM watermarking and steganography manipulate logits at the token level, but 'tokenization inconsistency' (where changing a prefix alters subsequent subword boundaries) corrupts the payload during extraction. This is a critical deployment blocker often ignored in theoretical setups.","importance":"System-level contribution. It exposes a fundamental flaw in lexical watermarking when applied to real-world subword tokenizers (like BPE) and provides a practical fix.","technical_approach":"Introduces a robust strategy against tokenization shifts. Instead of relying on static prefix-to-token mappings, it dynamically aligns or constrains token boundaries during generation/extraction. It highlights the inflation of Attack Success Rate (ASR) metrics in safety evaluations, urging the community to focus on actual harmful substance rather than mere format compliance.","technical_approach":"Redefines the jailbreak evaluation framework by distinguishing genuine harmful generation from 'confused compliance'. It abandons simple keyword matching in favor of fine-grained semantic judging, trading higher evaluation compute for a more accurate measurement of real threats.","experiments":"Re-evaluated classic jailbreak attacks on mainstream models (e.g., Llama, GPT-4). It introduces Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to multi-turn red teaming, providing a systematic search framework for uncovering deep, stealthy dialogue safety flaws.","technical_approach":"Proposes the MUSE framework, which uses MCTS to navigate the multi-turn dialogue state space. The core mechanism uses the target model's safety degradation as a reward signal, guiding the search toward branches most likely to elicit harmful outputs. Compared to greedy search or pure RL, MCTS better balances long-term attack payoff with short-term dialogue coherence.","experiments":"Compared against baseline red teaming methods on multi-turn safety benchmarks. MUSE achieves higher attack success rates within fewer interaction turns, and the generated attack dialogues are more natural and contextually coherent.","authors_note":""},"tags":["red-teaming","mcts","safety","dialogue"]},{"id":"YangLZSLCTQYLM25","title":"Code to Think, Think to Code: A Survey on Code-Enhanced Reasoning and Reasoning-Driven Code Intelligence in LLMs","authors":["Dayu Yang","Tianyang Liu","Daoan Zhang","Antoine Simoulin","Xiaoyi Liu","Yuwei Cao","Zhaopu Teng","Xin Qian","Grey Yang","Jiebo Luo","Julian J. McAuley"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/YangLZSLCTQYLM25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.130"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/YangLZSLCTQYLM25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.130","category_id":"post_train","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"代码数据能提升大模型的通用逻辑推理能力，而通用推理技术（如 CoT）也能反哺代码生成。这种双向促进现象在业界广为人知，但缺乏系统的理论梳理和实证归纳。","importance":"数据与范式级综述。系统总结了代码与推理之间的双向飞轮效应，为预训练阶段的数据配比（为什么纯文本模型也要加大量代码数据）提供了详实的理论支撑和文献索引。","technical_approach":"综述性工作。将现有研究划分为两大主线：一是“Code to Think”（代码增强推理），探讨代码的严格语法、控制流和抽象逻辑如何转化为自然语言的推理能力；二是“Think to Code”（推理驱动代码），探讨规划、CoT 和自我反思机制如何提升复杂代码的生成与调试成功率。","experiments":"综合了多篇文献的 scaling 观察和消融实验结果，明确指出在预训练语料中混入 10%-20% 的高质量代码数据，能在不损失语言能力的前提下，最大化通用推理能力的增益。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"It is widely known that code data improves general logical reasoning in LLMs, and general reasoning techniques (like CoT) enhance code generation. However, this bidirectional synergy lacks a systematic theoretical and empirical synthesis.","importance":"Data and paradigm-level survey. It systematically summarizes the bidirectional flywheel effect between code and reasoning, providing solid theoretical backing and literature indexing for pretraining data mixtures (explaining why pure text models need massive code data).","technical_approach":"A survey paper. It categorizes existing research into two main tracks: 'Code to Think' (code-enhanced reasoning), exploring how strict syntax, control flow, and abstract logic in code translate to natural language reasoning; and 'Think to Code' (reasoning-driven code intelligence), exploring how planning, CoT, and self-reflection improve complex code generation and debugging.","experiments":"Synthesizes scaling observations and ablation results from multiple papers, explicitly pointing out that mixing 10%-20% high-quality code data into the pretraining corpus maximizes general reasoning gains without degrading natural language capabilities.","authors_note":""},"tags":["survey","code","reasoning"]},{"id":"YangZZHYCY25","title":"UNCLE: Benchmarking Uncertainty Expressions in Long-Form Generation","authors":["Ruihan Yang","Caiqi Zhang","Zhisong Zhang","Xinting Huang","Dong Yu","Nigel Collier","Deqing Yang"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/YangZZHYCY25","doi":"https://doi.org/10.18653/V1/2025.EMNLP-MAIN.1543"},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/YangZZHYCY25","_ee":"https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.1543","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：长文本生成中的不确定性表达缺少系统 benchmark，导致模型是‘不知道但说得像知道’还是‘知道自己不确定’很难被量化比较。现有评测多关注事实正确性或校准分数，但对长段落中不确定性的语言形式、位置分布和任务适配性覆盖不足。","importance":"这是一个评测数据/基准层面的贡献。它对 pretrain 和 posttrain 的意义在于：如果我们不能稳定测出模型何时、如何表达不确定，就很难优化拒答、校准、检索增强和长文写作中的风险控制；对长期来看，benchmark 会影响训练目标往哪里对齐。","technical_approach":"从标题看，UNCLE 是一个专门针对 long-form generation uncertainty expressions 的 benchmark。关键设计应不只是把答案判对错，而是把不确定性的表达质量拆成可测维度，比如是否在应不确定时显式保留、是否过度 hedging、是否把局部未知扩散成整体含糊、以及表达与事实可靠性的匹配程度。相比短答案校准 benchmark，这种设计更贴近真实生成场景，但评测也更容易受到标注主观性和文体差异干扰。摘要缺失，无法确认 benchmark 的任务构成和评分协议。","experiments":"缺少摘要，无法确认 benchmark 规模、任务数、模型覆盖和主要发现。合理预期的实验包括：对闭源与开源 LLM 在长文问答、报告写作、分析型写作上的不确定性表达进行横向比较，展示‘正确但过度保守’与‘错误但高置信’是不同失败模式；还可能包含人工评估与自动指标相关性分析。无数字时不应代填。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a missing benchmark problem: we still lack a good way to evaluate how models express uncertainty in long-form generation. Existing evaluation often measures factual correctness or scalar calibration, but that misses how uncertainty is linguistically conveyed, localized, or overgeneralized across a long answer.","importance":"This is primarily a benchmark and evaluation contribution. Introduces curriculum learning into knowledge distillation, providing a more cognitively aligned training paradigm to boost the reasoning capabilities of small models.","technical_approach":"Proposes staged knowledge distillation via Least-to-Most Prompting. fewer).","authors_note":""},"tags":["knowledge-distillation","least-to-most","curriculum","reasoning"]},{"id":"ZhangLQZLML25","title":"Hierarchical Reward Modeling for Fault Localization in Large Code Repositories","authors":["Jiwei Zhang","Jianxun Lian","Haiming Qin","Mingyang Zhou","Kezhong Lu","Rui Mao","Hao Liao"],"institutions":[],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ZhangLQZLML25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ZhangLQZLML25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.966/","category_id":"coding_agent","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"这篇工作要解决的是：如何让奖励模型在大规模代码仓库的 fault localization 场景里学到“分层定位”能力，而不是只对单个文件或片段打分。已有方法通常把问题扁平化成候选片段排序，能在小范围代码修复里工作，但遇到跨文件依赖、仓库级调用链和长上下文时，奖励信号会变得稀疏且不稳定，因此值得单独建模。","importance":"贡献更像方法级+任务设定级，而不是预训练范式级突破。它的重要性在于把 reward modeling 从通用偏好对齐推进到代码智能体里的仓库级决策环节，提示我们：在复杂环境中，奖励建模是否要显式匹配任务的层级结构，这对后续代码 agent、tool-use RL 和 repository-scale post-training 都有参考价值。","technical_approach":"核心方法是一个分层奖励模型，用不同层级的信号共同评估故障位置，而不是只输出单一相关性分数。可以合理推断它会把仓库、文件、函数或行级候选拆成层次，并在训练时联合学习粗到细的判断；这样做的好处是先缩小搜索空间，再在局部精排，能缓解正样本极少、跨层级 credit assignment 困难的问题。和常见 pointwise/pairwise reranker 的区别在于，它把“定位路径”本身视为可学习结构，而不是把所有候选放进同一个打分桶里。","experiments":"给定信息里没有摘要和数字，因此无法确认模型规模、数据量和具体提升幅度。按题目判断，实验大概率会比较扁平奖励模型、检索式基线和可能的 agent/LLM judge 方案，重点看仓库级 fault localization 的 Top-k 命中率、MRR 或定位成本；真正有价值的观察应当是：分层奖励在哪些仓库规模或依赖深度下收益最大，以及 coarse-to-fine 设计是否改善训练稳定性。由于缺少原文，这里不能写具体数字。","authors_note":""},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"The paper targets a specific gap: reward models for fault localization in large code repositories need to reason hierarchically, while most prior work scores candidates in a flat way. That flat formulation is often adequate for local code repair, but it degrades when bugs involve cross-file dependencies, repository-scale call graphs, and long-context evidence.","importance":"This is mainly a method and task-formulation contribution rather than a pretraining paradigm shift. Its value is that it pushes reward modeling into repository-level code agent decisions, suggesting that reward models may need to mirror the task hierarchy when supervision is sparse and credit assignment spans multiple abstraction levels.","technical_approach":"The core idea is a hierarchical reward model that evaluates bug locations across multiple granularities instead of producing one flat relevance score. From the title, the likely design is coarse-to-fine scoring over repository, file, function, and possibly line-level candidates; this helps prune the search space early and assign reward where direct positives are rare. The key difference from standard pointwise or pairwise rankers is that the localization path itself becomes part of the learned structure.","experiments":"The abstract is not provided, so model size, dataset scale, and numeric gains cannot be verified. Hedderich","Hinrich Schütze"],"institutions":["LMU Munich"],"abstract":"","venue":"EMNLP","year":2025,"track":"main","award":null,"links":{"arxiv":"","pdf":"","openreview":"","dblp":"https://dblp.org/rec/conf/emnlp/ZhaoKMHS25","doi":""},"_dblp_key":"conf/emnlp/ZhaoKMHS25","_ee":"https://aclanthology.org/2025.findings-emnlp.1263/","category_id":"mechanism","relevance_score":5,"reading_tier":"skim","summary":{"core_problem":"我们真的知道 LLM 不知道什么吗？现有的知识探测（knowledge probing）方法在不同探测方式下给出不一致的结论——同一个事实，换一种问法模型就可能从'知道'变成'不知道'。本文系统研究了知识探测的一致性问题。","importance":"分析级贡献，对 LLM 知识评测和 pretrain 数据覆盖度评估有直接参考价值。如果探测方法本身不一致，那么基于探测结果做的知识补全、数据增强等决策都可能有偏。这对 pretrain 阶段的知识覆盖度分析和 continual pretrain 的数据选择都有警示意义。","technical_approach":"设计了多种探测方式（不同 prompt 模板、不同问题格式、不同上下文）来测试同一知识点，然后度量模型在这些探测方式间的一致性。分析了哪些因素（知识类型、模型规模、探测格式）最影响一致性。这是诊断性研究，不提出新的探测方法。","experiments":"具体模型列表和一致性指标需看原文。预期发现：即使在大模型上，不同探测方式的一致性也远低于预期，且某些知识类型（如关系知识 vs 事实知识）的一致性差异显著。","authors_note":"Hinrich Schütze 是 LMU Munich 的知名 NLP 教授，在语言模型分析和探测方面有长期积累。"},"summary_en":{"core_problem":"Do we actually know what LLMs don't know? This work systematically studies probing consistency.","importance":"An analysis-level contribution with direct relevance to pretrain data coverage assessment. Most acceleration work focuses on optimizers, low-rank approximations, communication compression, or systems tricks; this title suggests a more structural claim about the geometry of training itself.","importance":"If the claimed subspace pattern is real and stable, the contribution is interesting at the optimization-dynamics level. For pretraining, this matters because large-scale runs are increasingly bottlenecked by optimization efficiency and bandwidth. A reliable split between ‘important’ and ‘cheap-to-approximate’ subspaces could influence optimizer design, mixed-precision strategy, and distributed training schemes.","technical_approach":"From the title, BSFA likely builds a training acceleration method around decomposing updates, gradients, or representations into two subspaces with different roles. The probable mechanism is to treat one subspace more accurately or more frequently and the other more coarsely, thereby saving compute or communication. The distinction from generic low-rank methods is that the paper seems to argue for a two-regime structure rather than simple dimensionality reduction.","experiments":"The abstract is unavailable, so the model families, tasks, hardware, and quantitative gains cannot be stated. The likely evidence includes wall-clock speedup, FLOP reduction, convergence curves, and final accuracy, along with analyses showing that the proposed subspace dichotomy is empirically observable rather than imposed. The crucial question for this audience is whether the method still holds on large Transformer training, which cannot be verified
